background ingestion goroutine\n53\t}\n54\t\n55\t// GetMondayNineAM returns the most recent Monday at 9am local time\n56\t// If today is Monday before 9am, returns last Monday's 9am\n57\tfunc GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n58\t\tnow := time.Now()\n59\t\t// Find the most recent Monday\n60\t\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n61\t\tif weekday == 0 {\n62\t\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n63\t\t}\n64\t\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n65\t\n66\t\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n67\t\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n68\t\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n69\t\n70\t\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n71\t\tif monday.After(now) {\n72\t\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n73\t\t}\n74\t\n75\t\treturn monday\n76\t}\n77\t\n78\t// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n133\t// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\n134\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n135\t\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n136\t\tgo func() {\n137\t\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n138\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n139\t\n140\t\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n141\t\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n142\t\t\tfor {\n143\t\t\t\tselect {\n144\t\t\t\tcase <-tc.stopIngestion:\n145\t\t\t\t\treturn\n146\t\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n147\t\t\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n148\t\t\t\t}\n149\t\t\t}\n150\t\t}()\n151\t}\n152\t\n153\t// StopBackgroundIngestion shuts down the background ingestion goroutine.\n154\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) StopBackgroundIngestion() {\n155\t\tif tc.stopIngestion != nil {\n156\t\t\tclose(tc.stopIngestion)\n157\t\t\ttc.stopIngestion = nil\n158\t\t}\n159\t}\n160\t\n161\t// runIngestionCycle scans all JSONL files and ingests new data into SQLite.\n162\t// Called by the background goroutine; uses ingestMu so it never blocks fast\n163\t// cache/lease operations.\n164\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n165\t\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n166\t\t\treturn\n167\t\t}\n168\t\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n169\t\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n170\t\t\treturn\n171\t\t}\n172\t\n173\t\tvar files []string\n174\t\tfor _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n175\t\t\tdirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n176\t\t\tif err != nil {\n177\t\t\t\tcontinue\n178\t\t\t}\n179\t\t\tfiles = append(files, dirFiles...)\n180\t\t}\n181\t\n182\t\tcompleteThreshold := GetFileCompleteThreshold()\n183\t\tfor _, file := range files {\n184\t\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(file)\n185\t\t\tif err != nil {\n186\t\t\t\tcontinue\n187\t\t\t}\n188\t\n189\t\t\tif agg, ok := tc.cache.GetFileAggregate(file); ok && agg.IsComplete {\n190\t\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n191\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n192\t\t\t\t}\n193\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n194\t\t\t}\n195\t\n196\t\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n197\t\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n198\t\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n199\t\t\t\t}\n200\t\t\t\tcontinue\n201\t\t\t}\n202\t\n203\t\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n204\t\t}\n205\t}\n206\t\n207\t// AddProjectsDir adds an Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n256\t// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n257\t// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\n258\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n259\t\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n260\t\t\tAvailable:    false,\n261\t\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n262\t\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n263\t\t\tModels:       []string{},\n264\t\t}\n265\t\n266\t\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n267\t\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n268\t\t\treturn metrics, nil\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n272\t\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n273\t\tif err != nil {\n274\t\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n275\t\t\treturn metrics, nil\n276\t\t}\n277\t\n278\t\t// Populate metrics from query results\n279\t\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n280\t\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n281\t\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n282\t\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n283\t\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n284\t\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n285\t\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n286\t\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n287\t\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n288\t\n289\t\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n290\t\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n294\t\tvar totalCost float64\n295\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n296\t\n297\t\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n298\t\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n299\t\n300\t\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n301\t\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n302\t\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n303\t\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n304\t\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n305\t\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n306\t\n307\t\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n308\t\t\t\tModel:               model,\n309\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n310\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n311\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n312\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n313\t\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n314\t\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n315\t\t\t}\n316\t\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n317\t\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n318\t\t}\n319\t\n320\t\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n321\t\n322\t\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n323\t\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n324\t\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n325\t\t})\n326\t\n327\t\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n328\t\n329\t\t// Calculate session average rate\n330\t\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n331\t\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n332\t\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n333\t\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n334\t\t\t}\n335\t\t}\n336\t\n337\t\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n338\t\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n339\t\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n340\t\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n341\t\t}\n342\t\n343\t\tmetrics.Available = true\n344\t\treturn metrics, nil\n345\t}\n346\t\n347\t// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n348\t// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\n349\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n350\t\tif tc.cache == nil {\n351\t\t\treturn nil\n352\t\t}\n353\t\n354\t\t// Check file modification time\n355\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n356\t\tif err != nil {\n357\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n358\t\t}\n359\t\n360\t\t// Get last processed state\n361\t\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n362\t\n363\t\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n364\t\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n365\t\t\treturn nil\n366\t\t}\n367\t\n368\t\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n369\t\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n370\t\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n371\t\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n372\t\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n373\t\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n374\t\t\tif err != nil {\n375\t\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n376\t\t\t}\n377\t\t\tdefer file.Close()\n378\t\n379\t\t\t// Count current lines\n380\t\t\tvar currentLineCount int64\n381\t\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n382\t\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n383\t\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n384\t\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n385\t\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n386\t\t\t}\n387\t\n388\t\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n389\t\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n390\t\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err != nil {\n391\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to invalidate file %s: %w\", filename, err)\n392\t\t\t\t}\n393\t\t\t\tlastLine = 0\n394\t\t\t}\n395\t\t}\n396\t\n397\t\t// Open file for processing\n398\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n399\t\tif err != nil {\n400\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n401\t\t}\n402\t\tdefer file.Close()\n403\t\n404\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n405\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n406\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n407\t\n408\t\tvar lineNumber int64\n409\t\tvar events []TokenEvent\n410\t\n411\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n412\t\t\tlineNumber++\n413\t\n414\t\t\t// Skip already processed lines\n415\t\t\tif lineNumber <= lastLine {\n416\t\t\t\tcontinue\n417\t\t\t}\n418\t\n419\t\t\tvar msg claudeMessage\n420\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(scanner.Bytes(), &msg); err != nil {\n421\t\t\t\tcontinue\n422\t\t\t}\n423\t\n424\t\t\t// Only process assistant messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n425\t\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n426\t\t\t\tcontinue\n427\t\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\t\t// Parse timestamp\n430\t\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, msg.Timestamp)\n431\t\t\tif err != nil {\n432\t\t\t\tcontinue\n433\t\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\t\tusage := msg.Message.Usage\n436\t\t\tcacheCreation := usage.CacheCreationInputTokens\n437\t\t\tif cacheCreation == 0 {\n438\t\t\t\tcacheCreation = usage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral5mInputTokens +\n439\t\t\t\t\tusage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral1hInputTokens\n440\t\t\t}\n441\t\n442\t\t\tevents = append(events, TokenEvent{\n443\t\t\t\tTimestamp:           timestamp,\n444\t\t\t\tModel:               msg.Message.Model,\n445\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         usage.InputTokens,\n446\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        usage.OutputTokens,\n447\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     usage.CacheReadInputTokens,\n448\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreation,\n449\t\t\t\tSourceFile:          filename,\n450\t\t\t\tLineNumber:          lineNumber,\n451\t\t\t})\n452\t\n453\t\t\t// Batch insert every 100 events\n454\t\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n455\t\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n456\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n457\t\t\t\t}\n458\t\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n459\t\t\t}\n460\t\t}\n461\t\n462\t\t// Insert remaining events\n463\t\tif len(events) > 0 {\n464\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n465\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert final batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n466\t\t\t}\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Update file state\n470\t\tif err := tc.cache.SetFileState(filename, lineNumber, fileInfo.ModTime()); err != nil {\n471\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n472\t\t}\n473\t\n474\t\treturn nil\n475\t}\n476\t\n477\t// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n478\t// searching across all configured roots.\n479\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findProjectDir(cwd string) string {\n480\t\tprojectName := strings.ReplaceAll(cwd, \"/\", \"-\")\n481\t\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n482\t\t\tprojectPath := filepath.Join(root, projectName)\n483\t\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(projectPath); err == nil {\n484\t\t\t\treturn projectPath\n485\t\t\t}\n486\t\t}\n487\t\treturn \"\"\n488\t}\n489\t\n490\t// findAllProjectDirs returns all project directories found under all configured roots.\n491\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findAllProjectDirs() ([]string, error) {\n492\t\tvar dirs []string\n493\t\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n494\t\t\tif root == \"\" {\n495\t\t\t\tcontinue\n496\t\t\t}\n497\t\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(root); os.IsNotExist(err) {\n498\t\t\t\tcontinue\n499\t\t\t}\n500\t\t\tentries, err := os.ReadDir(root)\n501\t\t\tif err != nil {\n502\t\t\t\tcontinue\n503\t\t\t}\n504\t\t\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n505\t\t\t\tif entry.IsDir() {\n506\t\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(root, entry.Name()))\n507\t\t\t\t}\n508\t\t\t}\n509\t\t}\n510\t\treturn dirs, nil\n511\t}\n512\t\n513\t// findJSONLFilesRecursive returns all *.jsonl files under dir, including subdirectories.\n514\t// This captures subagent files stored at <project>/<uuid>/subagents/agent-*.jsonl\n515\t// in addition to the top-level <project>/<uuid>.jsonl conversation files.\n516\tfunc findJSONLFilesRecursive(dir string) ([]string, error) {\n517\t\tvar files []string\n518\t\terr := filepath.Walk(dir, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {\n519\t\t\tif err != nil {\n520\t\t\t\treturn nil\n521\t\t\t}\n522\t\t\tif !info.IsDir() && strings.HasSuffix(path, \".jsonl\") {\n523\t\t\t\tfiles = append(files, path)\n524\t\t\t}\n525\t\t\treturn nil\n526\t\t})\n527\t\treturn files, err\n528\t}\n529\t\n530\t// calculate60sRate calculates the token rate over the last 60 seconds\n531\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) calculate60sRate(events []TimestampedTokens) float64 {\n532\t\tif len(events) == 0 {\n533\t\t\treturn 0\n534\t\t}\n535\t\n536\t\t// Get the most recent timestamp\n537\t\tlastTime := events[len(events)-1].Timestamp\n538\t\tcutoffTime := lastTime.Add(-60 * time.Second)\n539\t\n540\t\t// Sum tokens in the last 60 seconds\n541\t\tvar totalTokens int64\n542\t\tvar windowStart time.Time\n543\t\n544\t\tfor i := len(events) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n545\t\t\tif events[i].Timestamp.Before(cutoffTime) {\n546\t\t\t\tbreak\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t\ttotalTokens += events[i].Tokens\n549\t\t\twindowStart = events[i].Timestamp\n550\t\t}\n551\t\n552\t\t// Calculate rate (tokens per minute)\n553\t\tif totalTokens == 0 {\n554\t\t\treturn 0\n555\t\t}\n556\t\n557\t\tduration := lastTime.Sub(windowStart)\n558\t\tif duration <= 0 {\n559\t\t\treturn 0\n560\t\t}\n561\t\n562\t\tminutes := duration.Minutes()\n563\t\tif minutes == 0 {\n564\t\t\treturn 0\n565\t\t}\n566\t\n567\t\treturn float64(totalTokens) / minutes\n568\t}\n569\t\n570\t// ModelPricing contains pricing rates for a Claude model\n571\ttype ModelPricing struct DuckDB\n845\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCacheDBPath() string {\n846\t\tif tc.cache != nil {\n847\t\t\treturn tc.cache.GetDBPath()\n848\t\t}\n849\t\treturn \"\"\n850\t}\n851\t\n852\t// FormatTokensCompact formats tokens with K/M/B suffixes for compact display\n853\tfunc FormatTokensCompact(count int64) string {\n854\t\tif count >= 1_000_000_000 {\n855\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fB\", float64(count)/1_000_000_000)\n856\t\t}\n857\t\tif count >= 1_000_000 {\n858\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fM\", float64(count)/1_000_000)\n859\t\t}\n860\t\tif count >= 1_000 {\n861\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0fK\", float64(count)/1_000)\n862\t\t}\n863\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", count)\n864\t}\n865\t\n866\t// FormatTokens formats a token count with thousands separators\n867\tfunc FormatTokens(count int64) string {\n868\t\tif count == 0 {\n869\t\t\treturn \"0\"\n870\t\t}\n871\t\n872\t\t// Handle negative numbers\n873\t\tnegative := count < 0\n874\t\tif negative {\n875\t\t\tcount = -count\n876\t\t}\n877\t\n878\t\t// Convert to string and add commas\n879\t\ts := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", count)\n880\t\tvar result []rune\n881\t\n882\t\tfor i, digit := range s {\n883\t\t\tif i > 0 && (len(s)-i)%3 == 0 {\n884\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, ',')\n885\t\t\t}\n886\t\t\tresult = append(result, digit)\n887\t\t}\n888\t\n889\t\tif negative {\n890\t\t\treturn \"-\" + string(result)\n891\t\t}\n892\t\treturn string(result)\n893\t}\n894\t\n895\t// FormatCost formats a cost value as currency with comma separators\n896\tfunc FormatCost(cost float64) string {\n897\t\tif cost == 0 {\n898\t\t\treturn \"$0.00\"\n899\t\t}\n900\t\tif cost < 0.01 {\n901\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%.4f\", cost)\n902\t\t}\n903\t\n904\t\t// Format with commas for costs >= $1,000\n905\t\tif cost >= 1000 {\n906\t\t\twholePart := int64(cost)\n907\t\t\tdecimalPart := cost - float64(wholePart)\n908\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%s.%02d\", FormatTokens(wholePart), int(decimalPart*100+0.5))\n909\t\t}\n910\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%.2f\", cost)\n911\t}\n912\t\n913\t// FormatTokenRate formats a token rate as tokens/min\n914\tfunc FormatTokenRate(rate float64) string {\n915\t\tif rate == 0 {\n916\t\t\treturn \"0 tok/min\"\n917\t\t}\n918\t\tif rate < 1000 {\n919\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f tok/min\", rate)\n920\t\t}\n921\t\t// For larger rates, format with thousands separator\n922\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s tok/min\", FormatTokens(int64(rate)))\n923\t}\n924\t\n925\t// FormatTokenRateCompact formats a token rate compactly (e.g., \"1.2M/min\")\n926\tfunc FormatTokenRateCompact(rate float64) string {\n927\t\tif rate == 0 {\n928\t\t\treturn \"0/min\"\n929\t\t}\n930\t\tif rate >= 1000000 {\n931\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fM/min\", rate/1000000)\n932\t\t}\n933\t\tif rate >= 1000 {\n934\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fK/min\", rate/1000)\n935\t\t}\n936\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f/min\", rate)\n937\t}\n938\t\n939\t// FormatDuration formats a duration in a human-readable format\n940\tfunc FormatDuration(d time.Duration) string {\n941\t\tif d < time.Minute {\n942\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0fs\", d.Seconds())\n943\t\t}\n944\t\tif d < time.Hour {\n945\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fm\", d.Minutes())\n946\t\t}\n947\t\thours := int(d.Hours())\n948\t\tif hours >= 24 {\n949\t\t\tdays := hours / 24\n950\t\t\tremainingHours := hours % 24\n951\t\t\tif remainingHours == 0 {\n952\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dd\", days)\n953\t\t\t}\n954\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dd %dh\", days, remainingHours)\n955\t\t}\n956\t\tminutes := int(d.Minutes()) % 60\n957\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dh%dm\", hours, withRetry[T any](ctx context.Context, operation func() (T, error)) (T, error) {\n60\t\tvar result T\n61\t\tvar lastErr error\n62\t\tdelay := baseRetryDelay\n63\t\n64\t\tfor attempt := 0; attempt < maxRetries; attempt++ {\n65\t\t\tselect {\n66\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n67\t\t\t\treturn result, ctx.Err()\n68\t\t\tdefault:\n69\t\t\t}\n70\t\n71\t\t\tresult, lastErr = operation()\n72\t\t\tif lastErr == nil {\n73\t\t\t\treturn result, nil\n74\t\t\t}\n75\t\n76\t\t\t// Check if it's a database lock error\n77\t\t\terrStr := lastErr.Error()\n78\t\t\tif !isLockError(errStr) {\n79\t\t\t\treturn result, lastErr\n80\t\t\t}\n81\t\n82\t\t\t// Wait before retry with exponential backoff\n83\t\t\tif attempt < maxRetries-1 {\n84\t\t\t\tselect {\n85\t\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n86\t\t\t\t\treturn result, ctx.Err()\n87\t\t\t\tcase <-time.After(delay):\n88\t\t\t\t}\n89\t\t\t\tdelay *= 2\n90\t\t\t\tif delay > maxRetryDelay {\n91\t\t\t\t\tdelay = maxRetryDelay\n92\t\t\t\t}\n93\t\t\t}\n94\t\t}\n95\t\n96\t\treturn result, fmt.Errorf(\"database operation failed after %d retries: %w\", maxRetries, lastErr)\n97\t}\n98\t\n99\t// withRetryNoResult executes a database operation that returns only an error\n100\tfunc withRetryNoResult(ctx context.Context, operation func() error) error {\n101\t\t_, err := withRetry(ctx, func() (struct{}, error) {\n102\t\t\treturn struct{}{}, operation()\n103\t\t})\n104\t\treturn err\n105\t}\n106\t\n107\t// isLockError checks if the error is a database lock error\n108\tfunc isLockError(errStr string) bool {\n109\t\tlockPhrases := []string{\n110\t\t\t\"database is locked\",\n111\t\t\t\"SQLITE_BUSY\",\n112\t\t\t\"SQLITE_LOCKED\",\n113\t\t\t\"database table is locked\",\n114\t\t}\n115\t\tfor _, phrase := range lockPhrases {\n116\t\t\tif contains(errStr, phrase) {\n117\t\t\t\treturn true\n118\t\t\t}\n119\t\t}\n120\t\treturn false\n121\t}\n122\t\n123\t// contains checks if s contains substr (case-insensitive)\n124\tfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n125\t\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > 0 && containsImpl(s, substr))\n126\t}\n127\t\n128\tfunc containsImpl(s, substr string) bool {\n129\t\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n130\t\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n131\t\t\t\treturn true\n132\t\t\t}\n133\t\t}\n134\t\treturn false\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\t// NewTokenCache creates a new SQLite-based token cache in the .ccdash directory\n138\tfunc NewTokenCache() *TokenCache {\n139\t\t// Get directory where binary is invoked {\n168\t\ttc.ingestMu.Lock()\n169\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.Unlock()\n170\t\n171\t\t// Enhanced connection string for multi-instance/multi-process support:\n172\t\t// _journal_mode=WAL: Write-Ahead Logging for better concurrent read/write support\n173\t\t// _synchronous=NORMAL: Balance between safety and performance\n174\t\t// _busy_timeout=30000: Wait up to 30 seconds for locks (increased from 5s)\n175\t\t// _txlock=immediate: Acquire write lock at transaction start to avoid deadlocks\n176\t\t// _cache_size=-64000: Use 64MB of cache (negative = KB)\n177\t\t// _mmap_size=268435456: {\n420\t\t\t\tsinceUnix = since.Unix()\n421\t\t\t}\n422\t\n423\t\t\t// Aggregate totals\n424\t\t\tquery := `\n425\t\t\t\tSELECT\n426\t\t\t\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0),\n427\t\t\t\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0),\n428\t\t\t\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0),\n429\t\t\t\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(cache_creation_tokens), 0),\n430\t\t\t\t\tMIN(timestamp_unix),\n431\t\t\t\t\tMAX(timestamp_unix),\n432\t\t\t\t\tCOUNT(*)\n433\t\t\t\tFROM token_events\n434\t\t\t\tWHERE timestamp_unix >= ?\n435\t\t\t`\n436\t\n437\t\t\tvar sinceUnix).Scan(\n439\t\t\t\t&result.InputTokens,\n440\t\t\t\t&result.OutputTokens,\n441\t\t\t\t&result.CacheReadTokens,\n442\t\t\t\t&result.CacheCreationTokens,\n443\t\t\t\t&minTS,\n444\t\t\t\t&maxTS,\n445\t\t\t\t&result.EventCount,\n446\t\t\t)\n447\t\t\tif err != nil {\n448\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n449\t\t\t}\n450\t\n451\t\t\tif minTS.Valid {\n452\t\t\t\tresult.EarliestTimestamp = time.Unix(minTS.Int64, 0)\n453\t\t\t}\n454\t\t\tif maxTS.Valid {\n455\t\t\t\tresult.LatestTimestamp = time.Unix(maxTS.Int64, 0)\n456\t\t\t}\n457\t\n458\t\t\t// Aggregate by model\n459\t\t\tmodelQuery := `\n460\t\t\t\tSELECT\n461\t\t\t\t\tmodel,\n462\t\t\t\t\tSUM(input_tokens) as input,\n463\t\t\t\t\tSUM(output_tokens) as output,\n464\t\t\t\t\tSUM(cache_read_tokens) as cache_read,\n465\t\t\t\t\tSUM(cache_creation_tokens) as cache_create\n466\t\t\t\tFROM token_events\n467\t\t\t\tWHERE timestamp_unix >= ?\n468\t\t\t\tGROUP BY model\n469\t\t\t`\n470\t\n471\t\t\trows, err := tc.db.QueryContext(ctx, modelQuery, sinceUnix)\n472\t\t\tif err != nil {\n473\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n474\t\t\t}\n475\t\t\tdefer rows.Close()\n476\t\n477\t\t\tresult.ModelMetrics = make(map[string]*ModelAggregation)\n478\t\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n479\t\t\t\tvar model string\n480\t\t\t\tvar input, output, cacheRead, cacheCreate int64\n481\t\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&model, &input, &output, &cacheRead, &cacheCreate); err != nil {\n482\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n483\t\t\t\t}\n484\t\t\t\tresult.ModelTokens[model] = input + output + cacheRead + cacheCreate\n485\t\t\t\tresult.ModelMetrics[model] = &ModelAggregation{\n486\t\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         input,\n487\t\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        output,\n488\t\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     cacheRead,\n489\t\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreate,\n490\t\t\t\t}\n491\t\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\t\treturn result, nil\n494\t\t})\n495\t}\n496\t\n497\t// AggregatedTokens contains the result of a token query\n498\ttype AggregatedTokens struct {\n499\t\tInputTokens         int64\n500\t\tOutputTokens        int64\n501\t\tCacheReadTokens     int64\n502\t\tCacheCreationTokens int64\n503\t\tEarliestTimestamp   time.Time\n504\t\tLatestTimestamp     time.Time\n505\t\tEventCount          int64\n506\t\tModelTokens         map[string]int64\n507\t\tModelMetrics        map[string]*ModelAggregation\n508\t}\n509\t\n510\t// ModelAggregation contains per-model token breakdown\n511\ttype ModelAggregation struct {\n512\t\tInputTokens         int64\n513\t\tOutputTokens        int64\n514\t\tCacheReadTokens     int64\n515\t\tCacheCreationTokens int64\n516\t}\n517\t\n518\t// FileAggregate contains pre-computed totals for a complete file\n519\ttype FileAggregate struct {\n520\t\tSourceFile          string\n521\t\tIsComplete          bool\n522\t\tCompletedAt         time.Time\n523\t\tTotalInputTokens    int64\n524\t\tTotalOutputTokens   int64\n525\t\tTotalCacheRead      int64\n526\t\tTotalCacheCreation  int64\n527\t\tEventCount          int64\n528\t\tEarliestTimestamp   time.Time\n529\t\tLatestTimestamp     time.Time\n530\t\tModelBreakdown      map[string]*ModelAggregation\n531\t}\n532\t\n533\t// GetFileAggregate returns the pre-computed aggregate for a file if it exists\n534\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) GetFileAggregate(sourceFile string) (*FileAggregate, bool) {\n535\t\ttc.ingestMu.RLock()\n536\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.RUnlock()\n537\t\n538\t\tif tc.db == nil {\n539\t\t\treturn nil, false\n540\t\t}\n541\t\n542\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), dbOperationTimeout)\n543\t\tdefer cancel()\n544\t\n545\t\tresult, err := withRetry(ctx, func() (*FileAggregate, error) {\n546\t\t\tvar agg FileAggregate\n547\t\t\tvar completedAt, earliest, latest int64\n548\t\t\tvar modelJSON string\n549\t\t\tvar isComplete int\n550\t\n551\t\t\terr := tc.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `\n552\t\t\t\tSELECT source_file, is_complete, completed_at, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens,\n553\t\t\t\t       total_cache_read_tokens, total_cache_creation_tokens, event_count,\n554\t\t\t\t       earliest_timestamp, latest_timestamp, model_breakdown\n555\t\t\t\tFROM file_aggregates WHERE source_file = ?\n556\t\t\t`, sourceFile).Scan(\n557\t\t\t\t&agg.SourceFile, &isComplete, &completedAt,\n558\t\t\t\t&agg.TotalInputTokens, &agg.TotalOutputTokens,\n559\t\t\t\t&agg.TotalCacheRead, &agg.TotalCacheCreation, &agg.EventCount,\n560\t\t\t\t&earliest, &latest, &modelJSON,\n561\t\t\t)\n562\t\t\tif err != nil {\n563\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n564\t\t\t}\n565\t\n566\t\t\tagg.IsComplete = isComplete == 1\n567\t\t\tagg.CompletedAt = time.Unix(completedAt, 0)\n568\t\t\tagg.EarliestTimestamp = time.Unix(earliest, 0)\n569\t\t\tagg.LatestTimestamp = time.Unix(latest, 0)\n570\t\n571\t\t\t// Parse model breakdown JSON\n572\t\t\tagg.ModelBreakdown = make(map[string]*ModelAggregation)\n573\t\t\tif modelJSON != \"\" && modelJSON != \"{}\" {\n574\t\t\t\tjson.Unmarshal([]byte(modelJSON), &agg.ModelBreakdown)\n575\t\t\t}\n576\t\n577\t\t\treturn &agg, nil\n578\t\t})\n579\t\n580\t\tif err != nil {\n581\t\t\treturn nil, false\n582\t\t}\n583\t\treturn result, true\n584\t}\n585\t\n586\t// IsFileComplete checks if a file is marked as complete\n587\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) IsFileComplete(sourceFile string) bool {\n588\t\tagg, ok := tc.GetFileAggregate(sourceFile)\n589\t\treturn ok && agg.IsComplete\n590\t}\n591\t\n592\t// MarkFileComplete aggregates all events for a file and marks it as complete\n593\t// This allows future queries to skip individual event processing for this file\n594\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) MarkFileComplete(sourceFile string) error {\n595\t\ttc.ingestMu.Lock()\n596\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.Unlock()\n597\t\n598\t\tif tc.db == nil {\n599\t\t\treturn nil\n600\t\t}\n601\t\n602\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), dbOperationTimeout)\n603\t\tdefer cancel()\n604\t\n605\t\treturn withRetryNoResult(ctx, func() error {\n606\t\t\t// Aggregate all events for this file\n607\t\t\tvar totalInput, totalOutput, totalCacheRead, totalCacheCreate int64\n608\t\t\tvar eventCount int64\n609\t\t\tvar minTS, maxTS sql.NullInt64\n610\t\n611\t\t\terr := tc.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `\n612\t\t\t\tSELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0),\n613\t\t\t\t       COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(cache_creation_tokens), 0),\n614\t\t\t\t       COUNT(*), MIN(timestamp_unix), MAX(timestamp_unix)\n615\t\t\t\tFROM token_events WHERE source_file = ?\n616\t\t\t`, sourceFile).Scan(&totalInput, &totalOutput, &totalCacheRead, &totalCacheCreate,\n617\t\t\t\t&eventCount, &minTS, &maxTS)\n618\t\t\tif err != nil {\n619\t\t\t\treturn err\n620\t\t\t}\n621\t\n622\t\t\t// Get per-model breakdown\n623\t\t\tmodelBreakdown := make(map[string]*ModelAggregation)\n624\t\t\trows, err := tc.db.QueryContext(ctx, `\n625\t\t\t\tSELECT model, SUM(input_tokens), SUM(output_tokens),\n626\t\t\t\t       SUM(cache_read_tokens), SUM(cache_creation_tokens)\n627\t\t\t\tFROM token_events WHERE source_file = ?\n628\t\t\t\tGROUP BY model\n629\t\t\t`, sourceFile)\n630\t\t\tif err != nil {\n631\t\t\t\treturn err\n632\t\t\t}\n633\t\t\tdefer rows.Close()\n634\t\n635\t\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n636\t\t\t\tvar model string\n637\t\t\t\tvar input, output, cacheRead, cacheCreate int64\n638\t\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&model, &input, &output, &cacheRead, &cacheCreate); err != nil {\n639\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n640\t\t\t\t}\n641\t\t\t\tmodelBreakdown[model] = &ModelAggregation{\n642\t\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         input,\n643\t\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        output,\n644\t\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     cacheRead,\n645\t\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreate,\n646\t\t\t\t}\n647\t\t\t}\n648\t\n649\t\t\tmodelJSON, _ := json.Marshal(modelBreakdown)\n650\t\n651\t\t\tvar earliest, latest int64\n652\t\t\tif minTS.Valid {\n653\t\t\t\tearliest = minTS.Int64\n654\t\t\t}\n655\t\t\tif maxTS.Valid {\n656\t\t\t\tlatest = maxTS.Int64\n657\t\t\t}\n658\t\n659\t\t\t// Insert or update the aggregate\n660\t\t\t_, err = tc.db.ExecContext(ctx, `\n661\t\t\t\tINSERT OR REPLACE INTO file_aggregates\n662\t\t\t\t(source_file, is_complete, completed_at, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens,\n663\t\t\t\t total_cache_read_tokens, total_cache_creation_tokens, event_count,\n664\t\t\t\t earliest_timestamp, latest_timestamp, model_breakdown)\n665\t\t\t\tVALUES (?, 1, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n666\t\t\t`, sourceFile, time.Now().Unix(), totalInput, totalOutput, totalCacheRead, totalCacheCreate,\n667\t\t\t\teventCount, earliest, latest, string(modelJSON))\n668\t\t\tif err != nil {\n669\t\t\t\treturn err\n670\t\t\t}\n671\t\n672\t\t\t// Delete individual events for this file to save space\n673\t\t\t_, err = tc.db.ExecContext(ctx, `DELETE FROM token_events WHERE source_file = ?`, sourceFile)\n674\t\t\treturn err\n675\t\t})\n676\t}\n677\t\n678\t// MarkFileActive marks a file as no longer complete (it's being written to again)\n679\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) MarkFileActive(sourceFile string) error {\n680\t\ttc.ingestMu.Lock()\n681\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.Unlock()\n682\t\n683\t\tif tc.db == nil {\n684\t\t\treturn nil\n685\t\t}\n686\t\n687\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), dbOperationTimeout)\n688\t\tdefer cancel()\n689\t\n690\t\treturn withRetryNoResult(ctx, func() error {\n691\t\t\t_, err := tc.db.ExecContext(ctx, `\n692\t\t\t\tUPDATE file_aggregates SET is_complete = 0 WHERE source_file = ?\n693\t\t\t`, sourceFile)\n694\t\t\treturn err\n695\t\t})\n696\t}\n697\t\n698\t// GetFileCompleteThreshold returns the threshold duration for marking files as complete\n699\tfunc GetFileCompleteThreshold() time.Duration {\n700\t\treturn fileCompleteThreshold\n701\t}\n702\t\n703\t// QueryTokensHybrid returns aggregated token metrics using both pre-aggregated\n704\t// complete files and individual events for active files\n705\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) QueryTokensHybrid(since time.Time) (*AggregatedTokens, error) {\n706\t\treturn tc.QueryTokensHybridContext(context.Background(), since)\n707\t}\n708\t\n709\t// QueryTokensHybridContext returns aggregated token metrics with context support\n710\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) QueryTokensHybridContext(ctx context.Context, since time.Time) (*AggregatedTokens, error) {\n711\t\ttc.ingestMu.RLock()\n712\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.RUnlock()\n713\t\n714\t\tif tc.db == nil {\n715\t\t\treturn &AggregatedTokens{}, nil\n716\t\t}\n717\t\n718\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, dbOperationTimeout)\n719\t\tdefer cancel()\n720\t\n721\t\treturn withRetry(ctx, func() (*AggregatedTokens, error) {\n722\t\t\tresult := &AggregatedTokens{\n723\t\t\t\tModelTokens:  make(map[string]int64),\n724\t\t\t\tModelMetrics: make(map[string]*ModelAggregation),\n725\t\t\t}\n726\t\n727\t\t\tvar sinceUnix int64\n728\t\t\tif !since.IsZero() {\n729\t\t\t\tsinceUnix = since.Unix()\n730\t\t\t}\n731\t\n732\t\t\t// Query 1: Sum from complete file aggregates (fast path)\n733\t\t\taggQuery := `\n734\t\t\t\tSELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_input_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(total_output_tokens), 0),\n735\t\t\t\t       COALESCE(SUM(total_cache_read_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(total_cache_creation_tokens), 0),\n736\t\t\t\t       COALESCE(SUM(event_count), 0), MIN(earliest_timestamp), MAX(latest_timestamp)\n737\t\t\t\tFROM file_aggregates\n738\t\t\t\tWHERE is_complete = 1 AND latest_timestamp >= ?\n739\t\t\t`\n740\t\n741\t\t\tvar aggInput, aggOutput, aggCacheRead, aggCacheCreate, aggCount int64\n742\t\t\tvar aggMinTS, aggMaxTS sql.NullInt64\n743\t\n744\t\t\terr := tc.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, aggQuery, sinceUnix).Scan(\n745\t\t\t\t&aggInput, &aggOutput, &aggCacheRead, &aggCacheCreate,\n746\t\t\t\t&aggCount, &aggMinTS, &aggMaxTS,\n747\t\t\t)\n748\t\t\tif err != nil && err != sql.ErrNoRows {\n749\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n750\t\t\t}\n751\t\n752\t\t\t// Get model breakdown from complete files\n753\t\t\taggModelQuery := `\n754\t\t\t\tSELECT model_breakdown FROM file_aggregates\n755\t\t\t\tWHERE is_complete = 1 AND latest_timestamp >= ?\n756\t\t\t`\n757\t\t\taggModelRows, err := tc.db.QueryContext(ctx, aggModelQuery, sinceUnix)\n758\t\t\tif err != nil && err != sql.ErrNoRows {\n759\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n760\t\t\t}\n761\t\t\tif aggModelRows != nil {\n762\t\t\t\tdefer aggModelRows.Close()\n763\t\t\t\tfor aggModelRows.Next() {\n764\t\t\t\t\tvar modelJSON string\n765\t\t\t\t\tif err := aggModelRows.Scan(&modelJSON); err != nil {\n766\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n767\t\t\t\t\t}\n768\t\t\t\t\tvar breakdown map[string]*ModelAggregation\n769\t\t\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal([]byte(modelJSON), &breakdown) == nil {\n770\t\t\t\t\t\tfor model, ma := range breakdown {\n771\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif existing, ok := result.ModelMetrics[model]; ok {\n772\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.InputTokens += ma.InputTokens\n773\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.OutputTokens += ma.OutputTokens\n774\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.CacheReadTokens += ma.CacheReadTokens\n775\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.CacheCreationTokens += ma.CacheCreationTokens\n776\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n777\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.ModelMetrics[model] = &ModelAggregation{\n778\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         ma.InputTokens,\n779\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        ma.OutputTokens,\n780\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     ma.CacheReadTokens,\n781\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: ma.CacheCreationTokens,\n782\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n783\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n784\t\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.ModelTokens[model] += ma.InputTokens + ma.OutputTokens +\n785\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tma.CacheReadTokens + ma.CacheCreationTokens\n786\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n787\t\t\t\t\t}\n788\t\t\t\t}\n789\t\t\t}\n790\t\n791\t\t\t// Query 2: Sum from individual events (for active/incomplete files)\n792\t\t\teventQuery := `\n793\t\t\t\tSELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0),\n794\t\t\t\t       COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(cache_creation_tokens), 0),\n795\t\t\t\t       MIN(timestamp_unix), MAX(timestamp_unix), COUNT(*)\n796\t\t\t\tFROM token_events\n797\t\t\t\tWHERE timestamp_unix >= ?\n798\t\t\t`\n799\t\n800\t\t\tvar evtInput, evtOutput, evtCacheRead, evtCacheCreate, evtCount int64\n801\t\t\tvar evtMinTS, evtMaxTS sql.NullInt64\n802\t\n803\t\t\terr = tc.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, eventQuery, sinceUnix).Scan(\n804\t\t\t\t&evtInput, &evtOutput, &evtCacheRead, &evtCacheCreate,\n805\t\t\t\t&evtMinTS, &evtMaxTS, &evtCount,\n806\t\t\t)\n807\t\t\tif err != nil && err != sql.ErrNoRows {\n808\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n809\t\t\t}\n810\t\n811\t\t\t// Get model breakdown from active events\n812\t\t\tevtModelQuery := `\n813\t\t\t\tSELECT model, SUM(input_tokens), SUM(output_tokens),\n814\t\t\t\t       SUM(cache_read_tokens), SUM(cache_creation_tokens)\n815\t\t\t\tFROM token_events WHERE timestamp_unix >= ?\n816\t\t\t\tGROUP BY model\n817\t\t\t`\n818\t\t\tevtModelRows, err := tc.db.QueryContext(ctx, evtModelQuery, sinceUnix)\n819\t\t\tif err != nil && err != sql.ErrNoRows {\n820\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n821\t\t\t}\n822\t\t\tif evtModelRows != nil {\n823\t\t\t\tdefer evtModelRows.Close()\n824\t\t\t\tfor evtModelRows.Next() {\n825\t\t\t\t\tvar model string\n826\t\t\t\t\tvar input, output, cacheRead, cacheCreate int64\n827\t\t\t\t\tif err := evtModelRows.Scan(&model, &input, &output, &cacheRead, &cacheCreate); err != nil {\n828\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n829\t\t\t\t\t}\n830\t\t\t\t\tif existing, ok := result.ModelMetrics[model]; ok {\n831\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.InputTokens += input\n832\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.OutputTokens += output\n833\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.CacheReadTokens += cacheRead\n834\t\t\t\t\t\texisting.CacheCreationTokens += cacheCreate\n835\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n836\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.ModelMetrics[model] = &ModelAggregation{\n837\t\t\t\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         input,\n838\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        output,\n839\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     cacheRead,\n840\t\t\t\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreate,\n841\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n842\t\t\t\t\t}\n843\t\t\t\t\tresult.ModelTokens[model] += input + output + cacheRead + cacheCreate\n844\t\t\t\t}\n845\t\t\t}\n846\t\n847\t\t\t// Combine results\n848\t\t\tresult.InputTokens = aggInput + evtInput\n849\t\t\tresult.OutputTokens = aggOutput + evtOutput\n850\t\t\tresult.CacheReadTokens = aggCacheRead + evtCacheRead\n851\t\t\tresult.CacheCreationTokens = aggCacheCreate + evtCacheCreate\n852\t\t\tresult.EventCount = aggCount + evtCount\n853\t\n854\t\t\t// Determine earliest/latest timestamps\n855\t\t\tvar minTS, maxTS int64 = 0, 0\n856\t\t\tif aggMinTS.Valid && aggMinTS.Int64 > 0 {\n857\t\t\t\tminTS = aggMinTS.Int64\n858\t\t\t}\n859\t\t\tif evtMinTS.Valid && evtMinTS.Int64 > 0 {\n860\t\t\t\tif minTS == 0 || evtMinTS.Int64 < minTS {\n861\t\t\t\t\tminTS = evtMinTS.Int64\n862\t\t\t\t}\n863\t\t\t}\n864\t\t\tif aggMaxTS.Valid {\n865\t\t\t\tmaxTS = aggMaxTS.Int64\n866\t\t\t}\n867\t\t\tif evtMaxTS.Valid && evtMaxTS.Int64 > maxTS {\n868\t\t\t\tmaxTS = evtMaxTS.Int64\n869\t\t\t}\n870\t\n871\t\t\tif minTS > 0 {\n872\t\t\t\tresult.EarliestTimestamp = time.Unix(minTS, 0)\n873\t\t\t}\n874\t\t\tif maxTS > 0 {\n875\t\t\t\tresult.LatestTimestamp = time.Unix(maxTS, 0)\n876\t\t\t}\n877\t\n878\t\t\treturn result, nil\n879\t\t})\n880\t}\n881\t\n882\t// QueryRecentEvents returns token events from the last N seconds for rate calculation\n883\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) QueryRecentEvents(seconds int64) ([]TimestampedTokens, error) {\n884\t\treturn tc.QueryRecentEventsContext(context.Background(), seconds)\n885\t}\n886\t\n887\t// QueryRecentEventsContext returns token events with context support\n888\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) QueryRecentEventsContext(ctx context.Context, seconds int64) ([]TimestampedTokens, error) {\n889\t\ttc.ingestMu.RLock()\n890\t\tdefer tc.ingestMu.RUnlock()\n891\t\n892\t\tif tc.db == nil {\n893\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n894\t\t}\n895\t\n896\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, dbOperationTimeout)\n897\t\tdefer cancel()\n898\t\n899\t\treturn withRetry(ctx, func() ([]TimestampedTokens, error) {\n900\t\t\tcutoff := time.Now().Unix() - seconds\n901\t\n902\t\t\tquery := `\n903\t\t\t\tSELECT timestamp_unix, input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens\n904\t\t\t\tFROM token_events\n905\t\t\t\tWHERE timestamp_unix >= ?\n906\t\t\t\tORDER BY timestamp_unix ASC\n907\t\t\t`\n908\t\n909\t\t\trows, err := tc.db.QueryContext(ctx, query, cutoff)\n910\t\t\tif err != nil {\n911\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n912\t\t\t}\n913\t\t\tdefer rows.Close()\n914\t\n915\t\t\tvar events []TimestampedTokens\n916\t\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n917\t\t\t\tvar ts int64\n918\t\t\t\tvar tokens int64\n919\t\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&ts, &tokens); err != nil {\n920\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n921\t\t\t\t}\n922\t\t\t\tevents = append(events, TimestampedTokens{\n923\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp: time.Unix(ts, 0),\n924\t\t\t\t\tTokens:    tokens,\n925\t\t\t\t})\n926\t\t\t}\n927\t\n928\t\t\treturn events, nil\n929\t\t})\n930\t}\n931\t\n932\t// TimestampedTokens represents tokens at a specific timestamp\n933\ttype TimestampedTokens struct {\n934\t\tTimestamp time.Time\n935\t\tTokens    int64\n936\t}\n937\t\n938\t// GetFileState returns the last processed line and modification time for a file\n939\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) GetFileState(sourceFile string) (lastLine int64, lastModified time.Time, exists bool) {\n940\t\treturn tc.GetFileStateContext(context.Background(), sourceFile)\n941\t}\n942\t\n943\t// GetFileStateContext returns file state with context support\n944\tfunc (tc *TokenCache) GetFileStateContext(ctx {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_5e4ce956eb3846d6862daa40","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# ccdash\n2\t\n3\tA lightweight terminal dashboard for Claude Code — shows token usage, cost, agent session status, and system resources in real time.\n4\t\n5\tBuilt with [Bubble Tea](https://github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea).\n6\t\n7\t---\n8\t\n9\t## What it shows\n10\t\n11\t**Token panel** — aggregates usage from Claude Code's JSONL logs in `~/.claude/projects`. Displays input, output, and cache tokens; total cost; tokens/min rate; and a per-model cost breakdown (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, etc.), color-coded and sorted by spend.\n12\t\n13\t**Session panel** — shows active Claude Code agent sessions and their current state:\n14\t\n15\t| Status | Meaning |\n16\t|--------|---------|\n17\t| WORKING | Claude is actively processing a turn |\n18\t| ASKING | Claude asked the human a question, waiting for input |\n19\t| READY | Prompt is idle, waiting for the next message |\n20\t| ACTIVE | User is typing in the session |\n21\t\n22\tSession tracking has two modes: tmux pane inspection (automatic) and hook-based tracking (more accurate, install with `ccdash --install-hooks`).\n23\t\n24\t**System panel** — CPU, memory, swap, disk, network I/O, and load average via [gopsutil](https://github.com/shirou/gopsutil).\n25\t\n26\t---\n27\t\n28\t## Installation\n29\t\n30\t### Pre-built binary\n31\t\n32\tDownload the latest release from the [releases page](https://github.com/jedarden/ccdash/releases), make it executable, and move it to your PATH.\n33\t\n34\t### Using Go\n35\t\n36\tRequires Go 1.21+.\n37\t\n38\t```bash\n39\tgo install github.com/jedarden/ccdash/cmd/ccdash@latest\n40\t```\n41\t\n42\t### From source\n43\t\n44\t```bash\n45\tgit clone https://github.com/jedarden/ccdash.git\n46\tcd ccdash\n47\tmake install\n48\t```\n49\t\n50\t---\n51\t\n52\t## Usage\n53\t\n54\t```bash\n55\tccdash\n56\t```\n57\t\n58\t### Keyboard controls\n59\t\n60\t| Key | Action |\n61\t|-----|--------|\n62\t| `q` / `Ctrl+C` | Quit |\n63\t| `r` | Force refresh |\n64\t| `h` | Cycle help panels (explains each section) |\n65\t| `l` | Open lookback picker (change the token measurement window) |\n66\t| `u` | Self-update to latest release (when available) |\n67\t\n68\t### Lookback window\n69\t\n70\tPress `l` to change how far back the token panel looks:\n71\t\n72\t- Monday 9am (default — useful for weekly work tracking)\n73\t- Today\n74\t- Last 24h / 7d / 30d / All time\n75\t- Custom date and time (navigate with arrow keys)\n76\t\n77\t### Layout\n78\t\n79\tccdash automatically adjusts to your terminal width:\n80\t\n81\t- **Narrow** (< 120 cols): panels stacked vertically\n82\t- **Wide** (120–239 cols): two panels on top, one below\n83\t- **Ultra-wide** (≥ 240 cols): three panels side by side\n84\t\n85\t---\n86\t\n87\t## Hook-based session tracking\n88\t\n89\tFor accurate per-session status (especially the WORKING/ASKING distinction), install Claude Code hooks:\n90\t\n91\t```bash\n92\tccdash --install-hooks\n93\t```\n94\t\n95\tThis writes hook scripts that fire on Claude Code lifecycle events, writing session state to `~/.ccdash/sessions/`. The dashboard reads those files alongside the tmux pane inspection — hook data takes precedence when available.\n96\t\n97\tCheck whether hooks are installed:\n98\t\n99\t```bash\n100\tccdash --check-hooks\n101\t```\n102\t\n103\t---\n104\t\n105\t## Multi-project token tracking\n106\t\n107\tBy default, ccdash scans `~/.claude/projects` for all JSONL usage files. To include additional project root directories:\n108\t\n109\t```bash\n110\t# Via flag (comma-separated)\n111\tccdash --extra-dirs /path/to/projects,/other/path\n112\t\n113\t# Via environment variable (colon-separated)\n114\tCCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS=/path/to/projects:/other/path ccdash\n115\t```\n116\t\n117\t---\n118\t\n119\t## Token cache\n120\t\n121\tToken data is persisted to `~/.ccdash/tokens.db` (SQLite). You can query it directly with `sqlite3` or DuckDB:\n122\t\n123\t```bash\n124\tsqlite3 ~/.ccdash/tokens.db \"SELECT model, SUM(total_tokens), SUM(cost) FROM token_events GROUP BY model;\"\n125\t```\n126\t\n127\t---\n128\t\n129\t## Project structure\n130\t\n131\t```\n132\tccdash/\n133\t├── cmd/ccdash/          # Entry point, CLI flags\n134\t├── internal/\n135\t│   ├── metrics/         # Collectors: system, tokens (JSONL + SQLite), tmux, hooks\n136\t│   └── ui/              # Bubble Tea dashboard model and panels\n137\t└── Makefile\n138\t```\n139\t\n140\t---\n141\t\n142\t## Development\n143\t\n144\t```bash\n145\tmake build    # Build binary to ./bin/ccdash\n146\tmake test     # Run tests\n147\tmake deps     # Download dependencies\n148\tmake clean    # Remove build artifacts\n149\t```\n150\t\n151\t---\n152\t\n153\t## Requirements\n154\t\n155\t- Go 1.21+\n156\t- `~/.claude/` directory (Claude Code data; created automatically when you use Claude Code)\n157\t- tmux (optional, for session panel)\n158\t\n159\t---\n160\t\n161\t## License\n162\t\n163\tMIT\n164\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_902822ba91ae4c5d9ae7be82","session_id":"e9a1a8f4-d6d9-4966-a05e-b4a4b44ccb85","uuid":"885bd0aa-eeea-4ac3-8bb4-6c3fe0fd429b","timestamp":"2026-06-25T05:05:10.106Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Explore ccdash JSONL scanning"}

Main Entry Points and CLI Structure\n\n**Entry Point:** `/home/coding/ccdash/cmd/ccdash/main.go`\n\n**CLI Flag Structure:**\n- **Flag:** `--extra-dirs` (line 28)\n- **Format:** Comma-separated paths with glob pattern support\n- **Environment Variable:** `CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS` (colon-separated, supports glob patterns)\n- **Default:** Always includes `~/.claude/projects`\n\n**Key Code Snippet:**\n```go\nextraDirs = flag.String(\"extra-dirs\", \"\", \n    \"Additional Claude project root directories to scan (comma-separated, supports glob patterns). Also set via CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS env var (colon-separated, supports glob patterns)\")\n```\n\n### 2. JSONL Scanning and Parsing Architecture\n\n**Main Processing File:** `/home/coding/ccdash/internal/metrics/tokens.go`\n\n**Core Data Flow:**\n1. **TokenCollector** struct (lines 48-53) manages the scanning process\n2. **Background ingestion** runs every 30 seconds (lines 134-151)\n3. **SQLite caching** decouples file I/O from UI queries\n\n**Key Processing Functions:**\n\n**Directory Discovery** (lines 490-511):\n```go\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findAllProjectDirs() ([]string, error) {\n    var dirs []string\n    for _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n        if root == \"\" {\n            continue\n        }\n        if _, err := os.Stat(root); os.IsNotExist(err) {\n            continue\n        }\n        entries, err := os.ReadDir(root)\n        if err != nil {\n            continue\n        }\n        for _, entry := range entries {\n            if entry.IsDir() {\n                dirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(root, entry.Name()))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return dirs, nil\n}\n```\n\n**JSONL File Discovery** (lines 513-528):\n```go\nfunc findJSONLFilesRecursive(dir string) ([]string, error) {\n    var files []string\n    err := filepath.Walk(dir, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {\n        if err != nil {\n            return nil\n        }\n        if !info.IsDir() && strings.HasSuffix(path, \".jsonl\") {\n            files = append(files, path)\n        }\n        return nil\n    })\n    return files, err\n}\n```\n\n**Ingestion Cycle** (lines 161-205):\n```go\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n    if len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n        return\n    }\n    projectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n    if err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n        return\n    }\n\n    var files []string\n    for _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n        dirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n        if err != nil {\n            continue\n        }\n        files = append(files, dirFiles...)\n    }\n    // ... file processing logic\n}\n```\n\n### 3. GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n58\t\tnow := time.Now()\n59\t\t// Find the most recent Monday\n60\t\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n61\t\tif weekday == 0 {\n62\t\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n63\t\t}\n64\t\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n65\t\n66\t\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n67\t\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n68\t\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n69\t\n70\t\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n71\t\tif monday.After(now) {\n72\t\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n73\t\t}\n74\t\n75\t\treturn monday\n76\t}\n77\t\n78\t// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n133\t// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\n134\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n135\t\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n136\t\tgo func() {\n137\t\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n138\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n139\t\n140\t\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n165\t\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n166\t\t\treturn\n167\t\t}\n168\t\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n169\t\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) {\n190\t\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n191\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n192\t\t\t\t}\n193\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n194\t\t\t}\n195\t\n196\t\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n197\t\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n198\t\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n199\t\t\t\t}\n200\t\t\t\tcontinue\n201\t\t\t}\n202\t\n203\t\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n204\t\t}\n205\t}\n206\t\n207\t// AddProjectsDir adds an Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n256\t// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n257\t// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\n258\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n259\t\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n260\t\t\tAvailable:    false,\n261\t\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n262\t\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n263\t\t\tModels:       []string{},\n264\t\t}\n265\t\n266\t\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n267\t\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n268\t\t\treturn metrics, nil\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n272\t\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n273\t\tif err != nil {\n274\t\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n275\t\t\treturn metrics, nil\n276\t\t}\n277\t\n278\t\t// Populate metrics from query results\n279\t\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n280\t\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n281\t\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n282\t\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n283\t\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n284\t\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n285\t\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n286\t\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n287\t\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n288\t\n289\t\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n290\t\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n294\t\tvar totalCost float64\n295\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n296\t\n297\t\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n298\t\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n299\t\n300\t\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n301\t\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n302\t\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n303\t\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n304\t\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n305\t\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n306\t\n307\t\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n308\t\t\t\tModel:               model,\n309\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n310\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n311\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n312\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n313\t\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n314\t\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n315\t\t\t}\n316\t\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n317\t\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n318\t\t}\n319\t\n320\t\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n321\t\n322\t\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n323\t\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n324\t\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n325\t\t})\n326\t\n327\t\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n328\t\n329\t\t// Calculate session average rate\n330\t\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n331\t\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n332\t\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n333\t\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n334\t\t\t}\n335\t\t}\n336\t\n337\t\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n338\t\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n339\t\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n340\t\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n341\t\t}\n342\t\n343\t\tmetrics.Available = true\n344\t\treturn metrics, nil\n345\t}\n346\t\n347\t// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n348\t// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\n349\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n350\t\tif tc.cache == nil {\n351\t\t\treturn nil\n352\t\t}\n353\t\n354\t\t// Check file modification time\n355\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n356\t\tif err != nil {\n357\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n358\t\t}\n359\t\n360\t\t// Get last processed state\n361\t\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n362\t\n363\t\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n364\t\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n365\t\t\treturn nil\n366\t\t}\n367\t\n368\t\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n369\t\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n370\t\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n371\t\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n372\t\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n373\t\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n374\t\t\tif err != nil {\n375\t\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n376\t\t\t}\n377\t\t\tdefer file.Close()\n378\t\n379\t\t\t// Count current lines\n380\t\t\tvar currentLineCount int64\n381\t\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n382\t\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n383\t\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n384\t\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n385\t\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n386\t\t\t}\n387\t\n388\t\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n389\t\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n390\t\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err != nil {\n391\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to invalidate file %s: %w\", filename, err)\n392\t\t\t\t}\n393\t\t\t\tlastLine = 0\n394\t\t\t}\n395\t\t}\n396\t\n397\t\t// Open file for processing\n398\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n399\t\tif err != nil {\n400\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n401\t\t}\n402\t\tdefer file.Close()\n403\t\n404\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n405\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n406\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n407\t\n408\t\tvar lineNumber int64\n409\t\tvar events []TokenEvent\n410\t\n411\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n412\t\t\tlineNumber++\n413\t\n414\t\t\t// Skip already processed lines\n415\t\t\tif lineNumber <= lastLine {\n416\t\t\t\tcontinue\n417\t\t\t}\n418\t\n419\t\t\tvar msg claudeMessage\n420\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(scanner.Bytes(), &msg); err != nil {\n421\t\t\t\tcontinue\n422\t\t\t}\n423\t\n424\t\t\t// Only process assistant messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n425\t\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n426\t\t\t\tcontinue\n427\t\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\t\t// Parse timestamp\n430\t\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, msg.Timestamp)\n431\t\t\tif err != nil {\n432\t\t\t\tcontinue\n433\t\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\t\tusage := msg.Message.Usage\n436\t\t\tcacheCreation := usage.CacheCreationInputTokens\n437\t\t\tif cacheCreation == 0 {\n438\t\t\t\tcacheCreation = usage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral5mInputTokens +\n439\t\t\t\t\tusage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral1hInputTokens\n440\t\t\t}\n441\t\n442\t\t\tevents = append(events, TokenEvent{\n443\t\t\t\tTimestamp:           timestamp,\n444\t\t\t\tModel:               msg.Message.Model,\n445\t\t\t\tInputTokens:         usage.InputTokens,\n446\t\t\t\tOutputTokens:        usage.OutputTokens,\n447\t\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     usage.CacheReadInputTokens,\n448\t\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreation,\n449\t\t\t\tSourceFile:          filename,\n450\t\t\t\tLineNumber:          lineNumber,\n451\t\t\t})\n452\t\n453\t\t\t// Batch insert every 100 events\n454\t\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n455\t\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n456\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n457\t\t\t\t}\n458\t\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n459\t\t\t}\n460\t\t}\n461\t\n462\t\t// Insert remaining events\n463\t\tif len(events) > 0 {\n464\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n465\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert final batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n466\t\t\t}\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Update file state\n470\t\tif err := tc.cache.SetFileState(filename, lineNumber, fileInfo.ModTime()); err != nil {\n471\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n472\t\t}\n473\t\n474\t\treturn nil\n475\t}\n476\t\n477\t// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n478\t// searching across all configured roots.\n479\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findProjectDir(cwd string) string {\n480\t\tprojectName := strings.ReplaceAll(cwd, \"/\", \"-\")\n481\t\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n482\t\t\tprojectPath := filepath.Join(root, projectName)\n483\t\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(projectPath); err == nil {\n484\t\t\t\treturn projectPath\n485\t\t\t}\n486\t\t}\n487\t\treturn \"\"\n488\t}\n489\t\n490\t// findAllProjectDirs returns all project directories found under all configured roots.\n491\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findAllProjectDirs() ([]string, error) {\n492\t\tvar dirs []string\n493\t\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n494\t\t\tif root == \"\" {\n495\t\t\t\tcontinue\n496\t\t\t}\n497\t\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(root); os.IsNotExist(err) {\n498\t\t\t\tcontinue\n499\t\t\t}\n500\t\t\tentries, err := os.ReadDir(root)\n501\t\t\tif err != nil {\n502\t\t\t\tcontinue\n503\t\t\t}\n504\t\t\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n505\t\t\t\tif entry.IsDir() {\n506\t\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(root, entry.Name()))\n507\t\t\t\t}\n508\t\t\t}\n509\t\t}\n510\t\treturn dirs, nil\n511\t}\n512\t\n513\t// findJSONLFilesRecursive returns all *.jsonl files under dir, including subdirectories.\n514\t// This captures subagent files stored at <project>/<uuid>/subagents/agent-*.jsonl\n515\t// in addition to the top-level <project>/<uuid>.jsonl conversation files.\n516\tfunc findJSONLFilesRecursive(dir string) ([]string, error) {\n517\t\tvar files []string\n518\t\terr := filepath.Walk(dir, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {\n519\t\t\tif err != nil {\n520\t\t\t\treturn nil\n521\t\t\t}\n522\t\t\tif !info.IsDir() && strings.HasSuffix(path, \".jsonl\") {\n523\t\t\t\tfiles = append(files, path)\n524\t\t\t}\n525\t\t\treturn nil\n526\t\t})\n527\t\treturn files, err\n528\t}\n529\t\n530\t// calculate60sRate calculates the token rate over the last 60 seconds\n531\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) calculate60sRate(events []TimestampedTokens) float64 {\n532\t\tif len(events) == 0 {\n533\t\t\treturn 0\n534\t\t}\n535\t\n536\t\t// Get the most recent timestamp\n537\t\tlastTime := events[len(events)-1].Timestamp\n538\t\tcutoffTime := lastTime.Add(-60 * time.Second)\n539\t\n540\t\t// Sum tokens in the last 60 seconds\n541\t\tvar totalTokens int64\n542\t\tvar windowStart time.Time\n543\t\n544\t\tfor i := len(events) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n545\t\t\tif events[i].Timestamp.Before(cutoffTime) {\n546\t\t\t\tbreak\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t\ttotalTokens += events[i].Tokens\n549\t\t\twindowStart = events[i].Timestamp\n550\t\t}\n551\t\n552\t\t// Calculate rate (tokens per minute)\n553\t\tif totalTokens == 0 {\n554\t\t\treturn 0\n555\t\t}\n556\t\n557\t\tduration := lastTime.Sub(windowStart)\n558\t\tif duration <= 0 {\n559\t\t\treturn 0\n560\t\t}\n561\t\n562\t\tminutes := duration.Minutes()\n563\t\tif minutes == 0 {\n564\t\t\treturn 0\n565\t\t}\n566\t\n567\t\treturn float64(totalTokens) / minutes\n568\t}\n569\t\n570\t// ModelPricing contains pricing rates for a Claude model\n571\ttype ModelPricing struct DuckDB\n845\tfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCacheDBPath() string {\n846\t\tif tc.cache != nil {\n847\t\t\treturn tc.cache.GetDBPath()\n848\t\t}\n849\t\treturn \"\"\n850\t}\n851\t\n852\t// FormatTokensCompact formats tokens with K/M/B suffixes for compact display\n853\tfunc FormatTokensCompact(count int64) string {\n854\t\tif count >= 1_000_000_000 {\n855\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fB\", float64(count)/1_000_000_000)\n856\t\t}\n857\t\tif count >= 1_000_000 {\n858\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fM\", float64(count)/1_000_000)\n859\t\t}\n860\t\tif count >= 1_000 {\n861\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0fK\", float64(count)/1_000)\n862\t\t}\n863\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", count)\n864\t}\n865\t\n866\t// FormatTokens formats a token count with thousands separators\n867\tfunc FormatTokens(count int64) string {\n868\t\tif count == 0 {\n869\t\t\treturn \"0\"\n870\t\t}\n871\t\n872\t\t// Handle negative numbers\n873\t\tnegative := count < 0\n874\t\tif negative {\n875\t\t\tcount = -count\n876\t\t}\n877\t\n878\t\t// Convert to string and add commas\n879\t\ts := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", count)\n880\t\tvar result []rune\n881\t\n882\t\tfor i, digit := range s {\n883\t\t\tif i > 0 && (len(s)-i)%3 == 0 {\n884\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, ',')\n885\t\t\t}\n886\t\t\tresult = append(result, digit)\n887\t\t}\n888\t\n889\t\tif negative {\n890\t\t\treturn \"-\" + string(result)\n891\t\t}\n892\t\treturn string(result)\n893\t}\n894\t\n895\t// FormatCost formats a cost value as currency with comma separators\n896\tfunc FormatCost(cost float64) string {\n897\t\tif cost == 0 {\n898\t\t\treturn \"$0.00\"\n899\t\t}\n900\t\tif cost < 0.01 {\n901\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%.4f\", cost)\n902\t\t}\n903\t\n904\t\t// Format with commas for costs >= $1,000\n905\t\tif cost >= 1000 {\n906\t\t\twholePart := int64(cost)\n907\t\t\tdecimalPart := cost - float64(wholePart)\n908\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%s.%02d\", FormatTokens(wholePart), int(decimalPart*100+0.5))\n909\t\t}\n910\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%.2f\", cost)\n911\t}\n912\t\n913\t// FormatTokenRate formats a token rate as tokens/min\n914\tfunc FormatTokenRate(rate float64) string {\n915\t\tif rate == 0 {\n916\t\t\treturn \"0 tok/min\"\n917\t\t}\n918\t\tif rate < 1000 {\n919\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f tok/min\", rate)\n920\t\t}\n921\t\t// For larger rates, format with thousands separator\n922\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s tok/min\", FormatTokens(int64(rate)))\n923\t}\n924\t\n925\t// FormatTokenRateCompact formats a token rate compactly (e.g., \"1.2M/min\")\n926\tfunc FormatTokenRateCompact(rate float64) string {\n927\t\tif rate == 0 {\n928\t\t\treturn \"0/min\"\n929\t\t}\n930\t\tif rate >= 1000000 {\n931\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fM/min\", rate/1000000)\n932\t\t}\n933\t\tif rate >= 1000 {\n934\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fK/min\", rate/1000)\n935\t\t}\n936\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f/min\", rate)\n937\t}\n938\t\n939\t// FormatDuration formats a duration in a human-readable format\n940\tfunc FormatDuration(d time.Duration) string {\n941\t\tif d < time.Minute {\n942\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0fs\", d.Seconds())\n943\t\t}\n944\t\tif d < time.Hour {\n945\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1fm\", d.Minutes())\n946\t\t}\n947\t\thours := int(d.Hours())\n948\t\tif hours >= 24 {\n949\t\t\tdays := hours / 24\n950\t\t\tremainingHours := hours % 24\n951\t\t\tif remainingHours == 0 {\n952\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dd\", days)\n953\t\t\t}\n954\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dd %dh\", days, remainingHours)\n955\t\t}\n956\t\tminutes := int(d.Minutes()) % 60\n957\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%dh%dm\", hours, TokenCollector struct {\n\tprojectsDirs  []string  // Root directories to scan for JSONL files\n\tlookbackFrom  time.Time // Only include data from this time onwards\n\tcache         *TokenCache\n\tstopIngestion chan struct{} // Closed to stop the background ingestion goroutine\n}\n\n// GetMondayNineAM returns the most recent Monday at 9am local time\n// If today is Monday before 9am, returns last Monday's 9am\nfunc GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\t// Find the most recent Monday\n\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n\tif weekday == 0 {\n\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n\t}\n\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n\n\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n\n\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n\tif monday.After(now) {\n\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n\t}\n\n\treturn monday\n}\n\n// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories to scan.\n// Always includes ~/.claude/projects as the primary directory.\n// Also reads CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS (colon-separated) for additional roots.\nfunc buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home string) []string {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tif home != \"\" {\n\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(home, \".claude\", \"projects\"))\n\t}\n\tif extra := os.Getenv(\"CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS\"); extra != \"\" {\n\t\tfor _, d := range
