ingests JSONL files into SQLite\n// independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n\tgo func() {\n\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\n\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-tc.stopIngestion:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}\n\n// StopBackgroundIngestion shuts down the background ingestion goroutine.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) StopBackgroundIngestion() {\n\tif tc.stopIngestion != nil {\n\t\tclose(tc.stopIngestion)\n\t\ttc.stopIngestion = nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// runIngestionCycle scans all JSONL files and ingests new data into SQLite.\n// Called by the background goroutine; uses ingestMu so it never blocks fast\n// cache/lease operations.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar files []string\n\tfor _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n\t\tdirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfiles = append(files, dirFiles...)\n\t}\n\n\tcompleteThreshold := GetFileCompleteThreshold()\n\tfor _, file := range files {\n\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(file)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif agg, ok := tc.cache.GetFileAggregate(file); ok && agg.IsComplete {\n\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddProjectsDir adds an additional root directory to scan for JSONL files.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) AddProjectsDir(path string) {\n\ttc.projectsDirs = append(tc.projectsDirs, path)\n}\n\n// SetLookback sets the lookback time filter\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) SetLookback(t time.Time) {\n\ttc.lookbackFrom = t\n}\n\n// GetLookback returns the current lookback time\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetLookback() time.Time {\n\treturn tc.lookbackFrom\n}\n\n// GetCache returns the underlying token cache for shared metrics operations\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCache() *TokenCache {\n\treturn tc.cache\n}\n\n// claudeMessage represents the structure of Claude API messages in JSONL\ntype claudeMessage struct {\n\tMessage   messageData `json:\"message\"`\n\tTimestamp string      `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tType      string      `json:\"type\"`\n}\n\n// messageData contains the actual API response\ntype messageData struct {\n\tModel string    `json:\"model\"`\n\tUsage usageData `json:\"usage\"`\n}\n\n// usageData contains token usage information\ntype usageData struct {\n\tInputTokens              int64         `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationInputTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadInputTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens             int64         `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreation            cacheCreation `json:\"cache_creation\"`\n}\n\n// cacheCreation contains detailed cache creation token breakdown\ntype cacheCreation struct {\n\tEphemeral5mInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\"`\n\tEphemeral1hInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\"`\n}\n\n// Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n\t\tAvailable:    false,\n\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n\t\tModels:       []string{},\n\t}\n\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Populate metrics from query results\n\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n\n\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n\tvar totalCost float64\n\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n\n\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n\n\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n\n\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n\t\t\tModel:               model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n\t\t}\n\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n\t}\n\n\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n\n\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n\t})\n\n\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n\n\t// Calculate session average rate\n\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n\t}\n\n\tmetrics.Available = true\n\treturn metrics, nil\n}\n\n// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n\tif tc.cache == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Check file modification time\n\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n\t}\n\n\t// Get last processed state\n\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n\n\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\t\t// Count current lines\n\t\tvar currentLineCount int64\n\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to invalidate file %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlastLine = 0\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Open file for processing\n\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t}\n\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n\n\tvar lineNumber int64\n\tvar events []TokenEvent\n\n\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n\t\tlineNumber++\n\n\t\t// Skip already processed lines\n\t\tif lineNumber <= lastLine {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar msg claudeMessage\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(scanner.Bytes(), &msg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Only process assistant messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Parse timestamp\n\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, msg.Timestamp)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tusage := msg.Message.Usage\n\t\tcacheCreation := usage.CacheCreationInputTokens\n\t\tif cacheCreation == 0 {\n\t\t\tcacheCreation = usage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral5mInputTokens +\n\t\t\t\tusage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral1hInputTokens\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tevents = append(events, TokenEvent{\n\t\t\tTimestamp:           timestamp,\n\t\t\tModel:               msg.Message.Model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         usage.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        usage.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     usage.CacheReadInputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreation,\n\t\t\tSourceFile:          filename,\n\t\t\tLineNumber:          lineNumber,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Batch insert every 100 events\n\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Insert remaining events\n\tif len(events) > 0 {\n\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert final batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Update file state\n\tif err := tc.cache.SetFileState(filename, lineNumber, fileInfo.ModTime()); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n// searching across all configured roots.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findProjectDir(cwd string) string {\n\tprojectName := strings.ReplaceAll(cwd, \"/\", \"-\")\n\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n\t\tprojectPath := filepath.Join(root, projectName)\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(projectPath); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn projectPath\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\n// findAllProjectDirs returns all project directories found under all configured roots.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findAllProjectDirs() ([]string, error) {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n\t\tif root == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(root); os.IsNotExist(err) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tentries, err := os.ReadDir(root)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n\t\t\tif entry.IsDir() {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(root, entry.Name()))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn dirs, nil\n}\n\n// findJSONLFilesRecursive returns all *.jsonl files under dir, including subdirectories.\n// This captures subagent files stored at <project>/<uuid>/subagents/agent-*.jsonl\n// in addition to the top-level <project>/<uuid>.jsonl conversation files.\nfunc findJSONLFilesRecursive(dir string) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar files []string\n\terr := filepath.Walk(dir, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !info.IsDir() && strings.HasSuffix(path, \".jsonl\") {\n\t\t\tfiles = append(files, path)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t})\n\treturn files, err\n}\n\n// calculate60sRate calculates the token rate over the last 60 seconds\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) calculate60sRate(events []TimestampedTokens) float64 {\n\tif len(events) == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Get the most recent timestamp\n\tlastTime := events[len(events)-1].Timestamp\n\tcutoffTime := lastTime.Add(-60 * time.Second)\n\n\t// Sum tokens in the last 60 seconds\n\tvar totalTokens int64\n\tvar windowStart time.Time\n\n\tfor i := len(events) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n\t\tif events[i].Timestamp.Before(cutoffTime) {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\ttotalTokens += events[i].Tokens\n\t\twindowStart = events[i].Timestamp\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate rate (tokens per minute)\n\tif totalTokens == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\tduration := lastTime.Sub(windowStart)\n\tif err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n}\n\n// setupHooks installs hooks, registers this instance, and returns the collector for cleanup\nfunc setupHooks() *metrics.HookSessionCollector {\n\tcollector, err := metrics.NewHookSessionCollector()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// Silently continue - hooks are optional\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\twasInstalled := collector.AreHooksInstalled()\n\n\t// Always run InstallHooks - it's idempotent and will add any missing hooks\n\tif err := collector.InstallHooks(); err != nil {\n\t\t// Installation failed - continue without hooks (tmux fallback will be used)\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"Note: Could not install Claude Code hooks: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"      Session tracking will use tmux fallback.\\n\")\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"      Run 'ccdash --install-hooks' to retry.\\n\\n\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Clean up orphaned session files on startup\n\t// This removes sessions where the process died or tmux session was killed\n\t// without the session-end hook firing\n\tcollector.CleanupOrphanedSessions()\n\n\t// Register this instance for multi-instance tracking\n\tif err := collector.RegisterInstance(); err != nil {\n\t\t// Non-fatal, continue without instance tracking\n\t\treturn collector\n\t}\n\n\t// Only notify on fresh install (not on updates)\n\tif !wasInstalled {\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"✓ Installed Claude Code hooks for session tracking\")\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"  Restart Claude Code sessions for hooks to take effect.\")\n\t\tfmt.Println()\n\t}\n\n\treturn collector\n}\n\nfunc printHelp() {\n\tfmt.Println(\"ccdash - Claude Code Dashboard\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Printf(\"Version: %s\\n\", version)\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\"USAGE:\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  ccdash [OPTIONS]\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\"OPTIONS:\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  --version             Show version information\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  --help                Show this help message\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  --install-hooks       Install Claude Code hooks for session tracking\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  --check-hooks         Check if Claude Code hooks are installed\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  --extra-dirs=<dirs>   Additional Claude project root directories to scan\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"                        Comma-separated list of paths, supports glob patterns\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"                        Example: /home/user/projects/*,/home/user/work/*/sessions\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"                        Also configurable via CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS env var (colon-separated)\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\"KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS:\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  q, Ctrl+C    Quit the dashboard\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  r            Refresh metrics immediately\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  h            Cycle through help panels\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  l            Open token usage lookback picker\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  1            Focus on System Resources panel\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  2            Focus on Network I/O panel\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  3            Focus on Token Usage panel\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  4            Focus on Sessions panel\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\"PANELS:\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  System Resources  - CPU, memory, swap, disk I/O, and load averages\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  Network I/O       - with status indicators\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\"SESSION TRACKING:\")\n\tfmt.Println(\"  ccdash supports two methods for tracking Claude Code sessions:\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Println(\" ModelUsage struct {\n\tModel               string  `json:\"model\"`\n\tInputTokens         int64   `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens        int64   `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadTokens `json:\"cost\"`\n}\n\n// TokenMetrics represents aggregated token usage metrics\ntype TokenMetrics struct {\n\tInputTokens         int64         `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens        int64         `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_tokens\"`\n\tTotalTokens         int64 TokenCollector collects and aggregates token usage from Claude Code sessions\ntype TokenCollector struct {\n\tprojectsDirs  []string  // Root directories to scan for JSONL files\n\tlookbackFrom  time.Time // Only include data from this time onwards\n\tcache         *TokenCache\n\tstopIngestion chan struct{} // Closed to stop the background ingestion goroutine\n}\n\n// GetMondayNineAM returns the most recent Monday at 9am local time\n// If today is Monday before 9am, returns last Monday's 9am\nfunc GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\t// Find the most recent Monday\n\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n\tif weekday == 0 {\n\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n\t}\n\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n\n\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n\n\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n\tif monday.After(now) {\n\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n\t}\n\n\treturn monday\n}\n\n// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories to scan.\n// Always includes ~/.claude/projects as the primary directory.\n// Also reads CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS (colon-separated) for additional roots.\nfunc buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home string) []string {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tif home != \"\" {\n\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(home, \".claude\", \"projects\"))\n\t}\n\tif extra := os.Getenv(\"CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS\"); extra != \"\" {\n\t\tfor _, d := range strings.Split(extra, \":\") {\n\t\t\tif d = strings.TrimSpace(d); d != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, d)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn dirs\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollector creates a new TokenCollector with default Monday 9am lookback\nfunc NewTokenCollector() *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithLookback creates a TokenCollector with a custom lookback time\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithLookback(lookbackFrom time.Time) *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: lookbackFrom,\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithPath creates a TokenCollector with a custom path (for testing)\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithPath(path string) *TokenCollector {\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: []string{path},\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// startBackgroundIngestion starts a goroutine that ingests JSONL files into SQLite\n// independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n\tgo func() {\n\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\n\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-tc.stopIngestion:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}\n\n// StopBackgroundIngestion shuts down the background ingestion goroutine.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) StopBackgroundIngestion() {\n\tif tc.stopIngestion != nil {\n\t\tclose(tc.stopIngestion)\n\t\ttc.stopIngestion = nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// runIngestionCycle scans all JSONL files and ingests new data into SQLite.\n// Called by the background goroutine; uses ingestMu so it never blocks fast\n// cache/lease operations.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar files []string\n\tfor _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n\t\tdirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfiles = append(files, dirFiles...)\n\t}\n\n\tcompleteThreshold := GetFileCompleteThreshold()\n\tfor _, file := range files {\n\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(file)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif agg, ok := tc.cache.GetFileAggregate(file); ok && agg.IsComplete {\n\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddProjectsDir adds an additional root directory to scan for JSONL files.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) AddProjectsDir(path string) {\n\ttc.projectsDirs = append(tc.projectsDirs, path)\n}\n\n// SetLookback sets the lookback time filter\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) SetLookback(t time.Time) {\n\ttc.lookbackFrom = t\n}\n\n// GetLookback returns the current lookback time\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetLookback() time.Time {\n\treturn tc.lookbackFrom\n}\n\n// GetCache returns the underlying token cache for shared metrics operations\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCache() *TokenCache {\n\treturn tc.cache\n}\n\n// claudeMessage represents the structure of Claude API messages in JSONL\ntype claudeMessage struct {\n\tMessage   messageData `json:\"message\"`\n\tTimestamp string      `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tType      string      `json:\"type\"`\n}\n\n// messageData contains the actual API response\ntype messageData struct {\n\tModel string    `json:\"model\"`\n\tUsage usageData `json:\"usage\"`\n}\n\n// usageData contains token usage information\ntype usageData struct {\n\tInputTokens              int64         `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationInputTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadInputTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens             int64         `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreation            cacheCreation `json:\"cache_creation\"`\n}\n\n// cacheCreation contains detailed cache creation token breakdown\ntype cacheCreation struct {\n\tEphemeral5mInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\"`\n\tEphemeral1hInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\"`\n}\n\n// Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n\t\tAvailable:    false,\n\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n\t\tModels:       []string{},\n\t}\n\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Populate metrics from query results\n\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n\n\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n\tvar totalCost float64\n\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n\n\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n\n\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n\n\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n\t\t\tModel:               model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n\t\t}\n\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n\t}\n\n\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n\n\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n\t})\n\n\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n\n\t// Calculate session average rate\n\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n\t}\n\n\tmetrics.Available = true\n\treturn metrics, nil\n}\n\n// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n\tif tc.cache == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Check file modification time\n\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n\t}\n\n\t// Get last processed state\n\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n\n\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\t\t// Count current lines\n\t\tvar currentLineCount int64\n\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to invalidate file %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlastLine = 0\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Open file for processing\n\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t}\n\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Parse timestamp\n\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, usage.CacheReadInputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreation,\n\t\t\tSourceFile:          filename,\n\t\t\tLineNumber:          lineNumber,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Batch insert every 100 events\n\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Insert remaining events\n\tif len(events) > 0 {\n\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n// calculate60sRate calculates the token rate over the last 60 seconds\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) calculate60sRate(events []TimestampedTokens) float64 {\n\tif len(events) == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Get the most recent timestamp\n\tlastTime := events[len(events)-1].Timestamp\n\tcutoffTime := lastTime.Add(-60 * time.Second)\n\n\t// Sum tokens in the last 60 seconds\n\tvar totalTokens int64\n\tvar windowStart time.Time\n\n\tfor i := len(events) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n\t\tif events[i].Timestamp.Before(cutoffTime) {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\ttotalTokens += cost value as currency with comma separators\nfunc FormatCost(cost float64) string {\n\tif cost == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"$0.00\"\n\t}\n\tif cost < 0.01 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%.4f\", cost)\n\t}\n\n\t// Format with commas for costs >= $1,000\n\tif cost >= 1000 {\n\t\twholePart := int64(cost)\n\t\tdecimalPart := cost - float64(wholePart)\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"$%s.%02d\", TokenCollector collects and aggregates token usage from Claude Code sessions\ntype TokenCollector struct {\n\tprojectsDirs  []string  // Root directories to scan for JSONL files\n\tlookbackFrom  time.Time // Only include data from this time onwards\n\tcache         *TokenCache\n\tstopIngestion chan struct{} // Closed to stop the background ingestion goroutine\n}\n\n// GetMondayNineAM returns the most recent Monday at 9am local time\n// If today is Monday before 9am, returns last Monday's 9am\nfunc GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\t// Find the most recent Monday\n\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n\tif weekday == 0 {\n\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n\t}\n\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n\n\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n\n\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n\tif monday.After(now) {\n\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n\t}\n\n\treturn monday\n}\n\n// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories to scan.\n// Always includes ~/.claude/projects as the primary directory.\n// Also reads CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS (colon-separated, supports glob patterns) for additional roots.\nfunc buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home string) []string {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tif home != \"\" {\n\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(home, \".claude\", \"projects\"))\n\t}\n\tif extra := os.Getenv(\"CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS\"); extra != \"\" {\n\t\tfor _, d := range strings.Split(extra, \":\") {\n\t\t\tif d = strings.TrimSpace(d); d != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, d)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn expandGlobPatterns(dirs)\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollector creates a new TokenCollector with default Monday 9am lookback\nfunc NewTokenCollector() *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithLookback creates a TokenCollector with a custom lookback time\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithLookback(lookbackFrom time.Time) *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: lookbackFrom,\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithPath creates a TokenCollector with a custom path (for testing)\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithPath(path string) *TokenCollector {\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: []string{path},\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// startBackgroundIngestion starts a goroutine that ingests JSONL files into SQLite\n// independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n\tgo func() {\n\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\n\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-tc.stopIngestion:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}\n\n// StopBackgroundIngestion shuts down the background ingestion goroutine.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) StopBackgroundIngestion() {\n\tif tc.stopIngestion != nil {\n\t\tclose(tc.stopIngestion)\n\t\ttc.stopIngestion = nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// runIngestionCycle scans all JSONL files and ingests new data into SQLite.\n// Called by the background goroutine; uses ingestMu so it never blocks fast\n// cache/lease operations.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar files []string\n\tfor _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n\t\tdirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfiles = append(files, dirFiles...)\n\t}\n\n\tcompleteThreshold := GetFileCompleteThreshold()\n\tfor _, file := range files {\n\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(file)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif agg, ok := tc.cache.GetFileAggregate(file); ok && agg.IsComplete {\n\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddProjectsDir adds an additional root directory to scan for JSONL files.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) AddProjectsDir(path string) {\n\ttc.projectsDirs = append(tc.projectsDirs, path)\n}\n\n// SetLookback sets the lookback time filter\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) SetLookback(t time.Time) {\n\ttc.lookbackFrom = t\n}\n\n// GetLookback returns the current lookback time\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetLookback() time.Time {\n\treturn tc.lookbackFrom\n}\n\n// GetCache returns the underlying token cache for shared metrics operations\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCache() *TokenCache {\n\treturn tc.cache\n}\n\n// claudeMessage represents the structure of Claude API messages in JSONL\ntype claudeMessage struct {\n\tMessage   messageData `json:\"message\"`\n\tTimestamp string      `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tType      string      `json:\"type\"`\n}\n\n// messageData contains the actual API response\ntype messageData struct {\n\tModel string    `json:\"model\"`\n\tUsage usageData `json:\"usage\"`\n}\n\n// usageData contains token usage information\ntype usageData struct {\n\tInputTokens              int64         `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationInputTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadInputTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens             int64         `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreation            cacheCreation `json:\"cache_creation\"`\n}\n\n// cacheCreation contains detailed cache creation token breakdown\ntype cacheCreation struct {\n\tEphemeral5mInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\"`\n\tEphemeral1hInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\"`\n}\n\n// Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n\t\tAvailable:    false,\n\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n\t\tModels:       []string{},\n\t}\n\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Populate metrics from query results\n\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n\n\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n\tvar totalCost float64\n\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n\n\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n\n\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n\n\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n\t\t\tModel:               model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n\t\t}\n\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n\t}\n\n\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n\n\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n\t})\n\n\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n\n\t// Calculate session average rate\n\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n\t}\n\n\tmetrics.Available = true\n\treturn metrics, nil\n}\n\n// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n\tif tc.cache == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Check file modification time\n\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n\t}\n\n\t// Get last processed state\n\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n\n\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\t\t// Count current lines\n\t\tvar currentLineCount int64\n\t\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n\t\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n\t\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to invalidate file %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlastLine = 0\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Open file for processing\n\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t}\n\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, 1024*1024)\n\tscanner.Buffer(buf, 10*1024*1024)\n\n\tvar lineNumber int64\n\tvar events []TokenEvent\n\n\tfor scanner.Scan() {\n\t\tlineNumber++\n\n\t\t// Skip already processed lines\n\t\tif lineNumber <= lastLine {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar msg claudeMessage\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(scanner.Bytes(), &msg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Only process assistant messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Parse timestamp\n\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, msg.Timestamp)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tusage := msg.Message.Usage\n\t\tcacheCreation := usage.CacheCreationInputTokens\n\t\tif cacheCreation == 0 {\n\t\t\tcacheCreation = usage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral5mInputTokens +\n\t\t\t\tusage.CacheCreation.Ephemeral1hInputTokens\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tevents = append(events, TokenEvent{\n\t\t\tTimestamp:           timestamp,\n\t\t\tModel:               msg.Message.Model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         usage.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        usage.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     usage.CacheReadInputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: cacheCreation,\n\t\t\tSourceFile:          filename,\n\t\t\tLineNumber:          lineNumber,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Batch insert every 100 events\n\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Insert remaining events\n\tif len(events) > 0 {\n\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert final batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Update file state\n\tif err := tc.cache.SetFileState(filename, lineNumber, fileInfo.ModTime()); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n// searching across all configured roots.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findProjectDir(cwd string) string {\n\tprojectName := strings.ReplaceAll(cwd, \"/\", \"-\")\n\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n\t\tprojectPath := filepath.Join(root, projectName)\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(projectPath); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn projectPath\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\n// findAllProjectDirs returns all project directories found under all configured roots.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) findAllProjectDirs() ([]string, error) {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tfor _, root := range tc.projectsDirs {\n\t\tif root == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(root); os.IsNotExist(err) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tentries, err := os.ReadDir(root)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n\t\t\tif entry.IsDir() {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(root, entry.Name()))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn dirs, nil\n}\n\n// findJSONLFilesRecursive returns all *.jsonl files under dir, including subdirectories.\n// This captures subagent files stored at <project>/<uuid>/subagents/agent-*.jsonl\n// in addition to the top-level <project>/<uuid>.jsonl conversation files.\nfunc findJSONLFilesRecursive(dir string) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar files []string\n\terr := filepath.Walk(dir, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !info.IsDir() && strings.HasSuffix(path, \".jsonl\") {\n\t\t\tfiles = append(files, path)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t})\n\treturn files, err\n}\n\n// calculate60sRate calculates the token rate over the last 60 seconds\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) calculate60sRate(events []TimestampedTokens) float64 {\n\tif len(events) == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Get the most recent timestamp\n\tlastTime := events[len(events)-1].Timestamp\n\tcutoffTime := lastTime.Add(-60 * time.Second)\n\n\t// Sum tokens in the last 60 seconds\n\tvar totalTokens int64\n\tvar windowStart time.Time\n\n\tfor i := len(events) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n\t\tif events[i].Timestamp.Before(cutoffTime) {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\ttotalTokens += events[i].Tokens\n\t\twindowStart = events[i].Timestamp\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate rate (tokens per minute)\n\tif totalTokens == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\tduration := lastTime.Sub(windowStart)\n\tif duration <= 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\tminutes := duration.Minutes()\n\tif minutes == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\treturn float64(totalTokens) / minutes\n}\n\n// ModelPricing contains pricing rates for a Claude model\ntype ModelPricing struct {\n\tInputPerMillion       float64\n\tOutputPerMillion      float64\n\tCacheReadPerMillion   float64\n\tCacheCreatePerMillion float64\n}\n\n// Model pricing constants (as of February 2026)\nvar modelPricing = map[string]ModelPricing{\n\t// Claude Opus 4.5 pricing\n\t\"claude-opus-4-5-20251101\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       5.0,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      25.0,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.50,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 6.25,\n\t},\n\t// Claude Sonnet 4.5 pricing\n\t\"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\": GLM-4.7 pricing - latest generation\n\t\"glm-4-7\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.6,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      2.2,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.11,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4.7\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.6,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      2.2,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.11,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4-7-flashx\": 4.5,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.22,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4.5-airx\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       1.1,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      4.5,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion: 0.0,\n\t},\n\t// GLM-4 pricing (legacy) - pricing from docs.z.ai\n\t\"glm-4\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.6,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      2.2,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.11,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4-plus\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       1.2,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      5.0,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.20,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4-9b-chat\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.6,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      2.2,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.11,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4-air\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.2,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      1.1,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.03,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n\t\"glm-4-flash\": {\n\t\tInputPerMillion:       0.07,\n\t\tOutputPerMillion:      0.4,\n\t\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.01,\n\t\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n\t},\n}\n\n// defaultPricing uses GLM-4.5 as the fallback (most common model for Z.AI proxy)\nvar defaultPricing = ModelPricing{\n\tInputPerMillion:       0.6,\n\tOutputPerMillion:      2.2,\n\tCacheReadPerMillion:   0.11,\n\tCacheCreatePerMillion: 0.00,\n}\n\n// getPricingForModel returns the pricing for a given model name\nfunc getPricingForModel(model string) ModelPricing {\n\t// Check exact match first\n\tif pricing, ok := modelPricing[model]; ok {\n\t\treturn pricing\n\t}\n\n\t// Check for model family prefix matches\n\t// GLM-5 models (flagship)\n\tif strings.Contains(model, \"glm-5-code\") {\n\t\treturn modelPricing[\"glm-5-code\"]\n\t}\n\tif ModelUsage struct {\n\tModel               string  `json:\"model\"`\n\tInputTokens         int64   `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens        int64   `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadTokens      `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_tokens\"`\n\tTotalTokens         int64 breakdown\n\tAvailable           bool          `json:\"available\"`\n\tError               string        `json:\"error,omitempty\"`\n\tLastUpdate          time.Time     `json:\"last_update\"`\n}\n\n// TokenCollector collects and aggregates token usage from Claude Code sessions\ntype TokenCollector struct {\n\tprojectsDirs  []string  // Root directories to scan for JSONL files\n\tlookbackFrom  time.Time // Only include data from this time onwards\n\tcache         *TokenCache\n\tstopIngestion chan struct{} // Closed to stop the background ingestion goroutine\n}\n\n// GetMondayNineAM returns the most recent Monday at 9am local time\n// If today is Monday before 9am, returns last Monday's 9am\nfunc GetMondayNineAM() time.Time {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\t// Find the most recent Monday\n\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n\tif weekday == 0 {\n\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n\t}\n\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n\n\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n\n\t// If we haven't reached 9am on Monday yet, go back to previous Monday\n\tif monday.After(now) {\n\t\tmonday = monday.AddDate(0, 0, -7)\n\t}\n\n\treturn monday\n}\n\n// buildDefaultProjectsDirs returns the list of root directories to scan.\n// Always includes ~/.claude/projects as the primary directory.\n// Also reads CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS (colon-separated, supports glob patterns) for additional roots.\nfunc buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home string) []string {\n\tvar dirs []string\n\tif home != \"\" {\n\t\tdirs = append(dirs, filepath.Join(home, \".claude\", \"projects\"))\n\t}\n\tif extra := os.Getenv(\"CCDASH_EXTRA_DIRS\"); extra != \"\" {\n\t\tfor _, d := range strings.Split(extra, \":\") {\n\t\t\tif d = strings.TrimSpace(d); d != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, d)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn expandGlobPatterns(dirs)\n}\n\n// expandGlobPatterns expands glob patterns in the input paths and returns\n// a deduplicated list of existing directories. Handles both literal paths\n// and glob patterns like \"/home/*/projects\" or \"/path/to/project*\".\nfunc expandGlobPatterns(paths []string) []string {\n\tseen := make(map[string]bool)\n\tvar result []string\n\n\tfor _, path := range paths {\n\t\tif path == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check if path contains glob characters\n\t\thasGlob := strings.ContainsAny(path, \"*?[\")\n\n\t\tif hasGlob {\n\t\t\t// Expand glob pattern\n\t\t\tmatches, err := filepath.Glob(path)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t// Invalid glob pattern, skip\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Add all matching directories\n\t\t\tfor _, match := range matches {\n\t\t\t\tif stat, err := os.Stat(match); err == nil && stat.IsDir() {\n\t\t\t\t\tif !seen[match] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tseen[match] = true\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, match)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Literal path - check if it exists as a directory\n\t\t\tif stat, err := os.Stat(path); err == nil && stat.IsDir() {\n\t\t\t\tif !seen[path] {\n\t\t\t\t\tseen[path] = true\n\t\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, path)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollector creates a new TokenCollector with default Monday 9am lookback\nfunc NewTokenCollector() *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithLookback creates a TokenCollector with a custom lookback time\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithLookback(lookbackFrom time.Time) *TokenCollector {\n\thome, _ := os.UserHomeDir()\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: buildDefaultProjectsDirs(home),\n\t\tlookbackFrom: lookbackFrom,\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// NewTokenCollectorWithPath creates a TokenCollector with a custom path (for testing)\nfunc NewTokenCollectorWithPath(path string) *TokenCollector {\n\ttc := &TokenCollector{\n\t\tprojectsDirs: []string{path},\n\t\tlookbackFrom: GetMondayNineAM(),\n\t\tcache:        NewTokenCache(),\n\t}\n\ttc.startBackgroundIngestion()\n\treturn tc\n}\n\n// startBackgroundIngestion starts a goroutine that ingests JSONL files into SQLite\n// independently of the UI refresh cycle. This decouples slow file I/O from the\n// fast DB query that populates the token panel.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) startBackgroundIngestion() {\n\ttc.stopIngestion = make(chan struct{})\n\tgo func() {\n\t\t// Run immediately so data is available as soon as possible\n\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\n\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-tc.stopIngestion:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\ttc.runIngestionCycle()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}\n\n// StopBackgroundIngestion shuts down the background ingestion goroutine.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) StopBackgroundIngestion() {\n\tif tc.stopIngestion != nil {\n\t\tclose(tc.stopIngestion)\n\t\ttc.stopIngestion = nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// runIngestionCycle scans all JSONL files and ingests new data into SQLite.\n// Called by the background goroutine; uses ingestMu so it never blocks fast\n// cache/lease operations.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) runIngestionCycle() {\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tprojectDirs, err := tc.findAllProjectDirs()\n\tif err != nil || len(projectDirs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar files []string\n\tfor _, projectDir := range projectDirs {\n\t\tdirFiles, err := findJSONLFilesRecursive(projectDir)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfiles = append(files, dirFiles...)\n\t}\n\n\tcompleteThreshold := GetFileCompleteThreshold()\n\tfor _, file := range files {\n\t\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(file)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif agg, ok := tc.cache.GetFileAggregate(file); ok && agg.IsComplete {\n\t\t\tif !fileInfo.ModTime().After(agg.CompletedAt) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileActive(file)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif time.Since(fileInfo.ModTime()) > completeThreshold {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.ingestJSONLFile(file); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\ttc.cache.MarkFileComplete(file)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttc.ingestJSONLFile(file)\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddProjectsDir adds an additional root directory to scan for JSONL files.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) AddProjectsDir(path string) {\n\ttc.projectsDirs = append(tc.projectsDirs, path)\n}\n\n// SetLookback sets the lookback time filter\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) SetLookback(t time.Time) {\n\ttc.lookbackFrom = t\n}\n\n// GetLookback returns the current lookback time\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetLookback() time.Time {\n\treturn tc.lookbackFrom\n}\n\n// GetCache returns the underlying token cache for shared metrics operations\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) GetCache() *TokenCache {\n\treturn tc.cache\n}\n\n// claudeMessage represents the structure of Claude API messages in JSONL\ntype claudeMessage struct {\n\tMessage   messageData `json:\"message\"`\n\tTimestamp string      `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tType      string      `json:\"type\"`\n}\n\n// messageData contains the actual API response\ntype messageData struct {\n\tModel string    `json:\"model\"`\n\tUsage usageData `json:\"usage\"`\n}\n\n// usageData contains token usage information\ntype usageData struct {\n\tInputTokens              int64         `json:\"input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreationInputTokens int64         `json:\"cache_creation_input_tokens\"`\n\tCacheReadInputTokens     int64         `json:\"cache_read_input_tokens\"`\n\tOutputTokens             int64         `json:\"output_tokens\"`\n\tCacheCreation            cacheCreation `json:\"cache_creation\"`\n}\n\n// cacheCreation contains detailed cache creation token breakdown\ntype cacheCreation struct {\n\tEphemeral5mInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\"`\n\tEphemeral1hInputTokens int64 `json:\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\"`\n}\n\n// Collect returns token metrics from the SQLite cache. File ingestion runs in a\n// background goroutine (started by the constructor) so this method only executes\n// the fast DB query and never blocks on file I/O.\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) Collect() (*TokenMetrics, error) {\n\tmetrics := &TokenMetrics{\n\t\tAvailable:    false,\n\t\tLastUpdate:   time.Now(),\n\t\tLookbackFrom: tc.lookbackFrom,\n\t\tModels:       []string{},\n\t}\n\n\tif len(tc.projectsDirs) == 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = \"No projects directories configured\"\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Query SQLite using hybrid approach (pre-aggregated + active events)\n\taggregated, err := tc.cache.QueryTokensHybrid(tc.lookbackFrom)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmetrics.Error = fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query token cache: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn metrics, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Populate metrics from query results\n\tmetrics.InputTokens = aggregated.InputTokens\n\tmetrics.OutputTokens = aggregated.OutputTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheReadTokens = aggregated.CacheReadTokens\n\tmetrics.CacheCreationTokens = aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.TotalTokens = aggregated.InputTokens + aggregated.OutputTokens +\n\t\taggregated.CacheReadTokens + aggregated.CacheCreationTokens\n\tmetrics.Prompts = aggregated.EventCount\n\tmetrics.EarliestTimestamp = aggregated.EarliestTimestamp\n\tmetrics.LatestTimestamp = aggregated.LatestTimestamp\n\n\tif !aggregated.EarliestTimestamp.IsZero() && !aggregated.LatestTimestamp.IsZero() {\n\t\tmetrics.TimeSpan = aggregated.LatestTimestamp.Sub(aggregated.EarliestTimestamp)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build model list and per-model usage\n\tvar totalCost float64\n\tmetrics.ModelUsages = make([]ModelUsage, 0, len(aggregated.ModelMetrics))\n\n\tfor model, mm := range aggregated.ModelMetrics {\n\t\tmetrics.Models = append(metrics.Models, model)\n\n\t\tpricing := getPricingForModel(model)\n\t\tinputCost := float64(mm.InputTokens) * pricing.InputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\toutputCost := float64(mm.OutputTokens) * pricing.OutputPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheReadCost := float64(mm.CacheReadTokens) * pricing.CacheReadPerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tcacheCreateCost := float64(mm.CacheCreationTokens) * pricing.CacheCreatePerMillion / 1_000_000\n\t\tmodelCost := inputCost + outputCost + cacheReadCost + cacheCreateCost\n\n\t\tusage := ModelUsage{\n\t\t\tModel:               model,\n\t\t\tInputTokens:         mm.InputTokens,\n\t\t\tOutputTokens:        mm.OutputTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheReadTokens:     mm.CacheReadTokens,\n\t\t\tCacheCreationTokens: mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tTotalTokens:         mm.InputTokens + mm.OutputTokens + mm.CacheReadTokens + mm.CacheCreationTokens,\n\t\t\tCost:                modelCost,\n\t\t}\n\t\tmetrics.ModelUsages = append(metrics.ModelUsages, usage)\n\t\ttotalCost += modelCost\n\t}\n\n\tsort.Strings(metrics.Models)\n\n\t// Sort model usages by cost (highest first)\n\tsort.Slice(metrics.ModelUsages, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn metrics.ModelUsages[i].Cost > metrics.ModelUsages[j].Cost\n\t})\n\n\tmetrics.TotalCost = totalCost\n\n\t// Calculate session average rate\n\tif metrics.TimeSpan > 0 {\n\t\tminutes := metrics.TimeSpan.Minutes()\n\t\tif minutes > 0 {\n\t\t\tmetrics.SessionAvgRate = float64(metrics.TotalTokens) / minutes\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate 60-second window rate from recent events\n\trecentEvents, err := tc.cache.QueryRecentEvents(60)\n\tif err == nil && len(recentEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tmetrics.Rate = tc.calculate60sRate(recentEvents)\n\t}\n\n\tmetrics.Available = true\n\treturn metrics, nil\n}\n\n// ingestJSONLFile reads a JSONL file and inserts new events into SQLite\n// Returns an error if database operations fail (for proper error handling)\nfunc (tc *TokenCollector) ingestJSONLFile(filename string) error {\n\tif tc.cache == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Check file modification time\n\tfileInfo, err := os.Stat(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted, not a critical error\n\t}\n\n\t// Get last processed state\n\tlastLine, lastMod, exists := tc.cache.GetFileState(filename)\n\n\t// If file hasn't been modified since last processing, skip\n\tif exists && !fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// If file was modified (truncated/rewritten), invalidate and reprocess\n\tif exists && fileInfo.ModTime().After(lastMod) {\n\t\t// Check if file was truncated (new size < last line count implies rewrite)\n\t\t// For safety, we'll just process from where we left off\n\t\t// but if file was completely rewritten, invalidate\n\t\tfile, err := os.Open(filename)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\t\t// Count {\n\t\t\tcurrentLineCount++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// If file has fewer lines than we processed, it was rewritten\n\t\tif currentLineCount < lastLine {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InvalidateFile(filename); err os.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil // File may have been deleted\n\t}\n\tdefer file.Close()\n\n\tscanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)\n\tbuf := make([]byte, 0, messages (count all requests, even with zero tokens)\n\t\tif msg.Type != \"assistant\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Parse timestamp\n\t\ttimestamp, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, events\n\t\tif len(events) >= 100 {\n\t\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to insert batch for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tevents = events[:0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Insert remaining events\n\tif len(events) > 0 {\n\t\tif err := tc.cache.InsertTokenEventBatch(events); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to set file state for %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// findProjectDir finds the Claude project directory for the given working directory,\n// Monday\n\tweekday := int(now.Weekday())\n\tif weekday == 0 {\n\t\tweekday = 7 // Sunday becomes 7 for easier math\n\t}\n\tdaysUntilMonday := weekday - 1 // Days since Monday (Mon=0, Tue=1, ...)\n\n\t// Start of Monday (midnight)\n\tmonday := now.AddDate(0, 0, -daysUntilMonday)\n\tmonday = time.Date(monday.Year(), monday.Month(), monday.Day(), 9, 0, 0, 0, monday.Location())\n\n\t// If we
